2Kings23:34 Farao-Neko si fi Eliakimu ọmọ Josiah jẹ ọba ni ipò Josiah baba rẹ̀, o si pa orukọ rẹ̀ dà si Jehoiakimu, o si mu Jehoahasi kuro; on si wá si Egipti, o si kú nibẹ." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoiakimu si fi fadakà ati wura na fun Farao; ṣugbọn o bu owo-odè fun ilẹ na lati san owo na gẹgẹ bi ofin Farao: o fi agbara gbà fadakà ati wurà na lọwọ awọn enia ilẹ na, lọwọ olukuluku gẹgẹ bi owo ti a bù fun u, lati fi fun Farao-Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Ẹni ọdun mẹ̃dọgbọ̀n ni Jehoiakimu nigbati o bẹ̀rẹ si ijọba; o si jọba ọdun mọkanla ni Jerusalemu. Orukọ iya rẹ̀ ni Sebuda, ọmọbinrin Bedaiah ti Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 On si ṣe eyiti o buru li oju Oluwa, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyiti awọn baba rẹ̀ ti ṣe." 
2Kings24:1 LI ọjọ rẹ̀ ni Nebukadnessari ọba Babeli gòke wá, Jehoiakimu si di iranṣẹ rẹ̀ li ọdun mẹta: nigbana li o pada o si ṣọ̀tẹ si i." 
2Kings24:2 Oluwa si rán ẹgbẹ́ ogun awọn ara Kaldea si i, ati ẹgbẹ́ ogun awọn ara Siria, ati ẹgbẹ́ ogun awọn ara Moabu, ati ẹgbẹ́ ogun awọn ọmọ Ammoni, o si rán wọn si Juda lati pa a run, gẹgẹ bi ọ̀rọ Oluwa, ti o ti sọ nipa awọn iranṣẹ rẹ̀ awọn woli." 
2Kings24:3 Nitõtọ lati ẹnu Oluwa li eyi ti wá sori Juda, lati mu wọn kuro niwaju rẹ̀, nitori ẹ̀ṣẹ Manasse, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyiti o ṣe;" 
2Kings24:4 Ati nitori ẹ̀jẹ alaiṣẹ̀ ti o ta silẹ pẹlu: nitoriti o fi ẹ̀jẹ alaiṣẹ̀ kún Jerusalemu; ti Oluwa kò fẹ darijì. 
2Kings24:5 Ati iyokù iṣe Jehoiakimu, ati gbogbo eyiti o ṣe, a kò ha kọ wọn sinu iwe ọ̀rọ ọjọ awọn ọba Juda?" 
2Kings24:6 Bẹ̃ni Jehoiakimu sùn pẹlu awọn baba rẹ̀: Jehoiakini ọmọ rẹ̀ si jọba ni ipò rẹ̀. 
2Kings24:7 Ọba Egipti kò si tun jade kuro ni ilẹ rẹ̀ mọ; nitori ọba Babeli ti gbà gbogbo eyiti iṣe ti ọba Egipti lati odò Egipti wá titi de odò Euferate. 
2Kings24:8 Ẹni ọdun mejidilogun ni Jehoiakini nigbati o bẹ̀rẹ si ijọba, o si jọba li oṣù mẹta ni Jerusalemu. Orukọ iya rẹ̀ ni Nehuṣta, ọmọbinrin Elnatani ti Jerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 On si ṣe eyiti o buru li oju Oluwa, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyiti baba rẹ̀ ti ṣe." 
2Kings24:10 Li akokò na, awọn iranṣẹ Nebukadnessari ọba Babeli gbé ogun wá si Jerusalemu, a si dotì ilu na." 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadnessari ọba Babeli si de si ilu na, nigbati awọn iranṣẹ rẹ̀ si dotì i." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoiakini ọba Juda si jade tọ̀ ọba Babeli lọ, on, ati iya rẹ̀, ati awọn iranṣẹ rẹ̀, ati awọn ijoye rẹ̀, ati awọn iwẹfa rẹ̀: ọba Babeli si mu u li ọdun kẹjọ ijọba rẹ̀." 
2Kings24:13 O si kó gbogbo iṣura ile Oluwa lọ kuro nibẹ, ati iṣura ile ọba, o si ké gbogbo ohun-èlo wura wẹwẹ ti Solomoni ọba Israeli ti ṣe ni tempili Oluwa, bi Oluwa ti sọ." 
2Kings24:14 O si kó gbogbo Jerusalemu lọ, ati gbogbo awọn ijoye, ati gbogbo awọn alagbara akọni enia, ani ẹgbãrun igbèkun, ati gbogbo awọn oniṣọnà ati awọn alagbẹ̀dẹ: kò kù ẹnikan, bikòṣe iru awọn ti o jẹ talakà ninu awọn enia ilẹ na." 
2Kings24:15 O si mu Jehoiakini lọ si Babeli, ati iya ọba, ati awọn obinrin ọba, ati awọn iwẹ̀fa rẹ̀, ati awọn alagbara ilẹ na, awọn wọnyi li o kó ni igbèkun lati Jerusalemu lọ si Babeli." 
2Kings24:16 Ati gbogbo awọn ọkunrin ọlọla, ẹ̃dẹgbãrin, ati awọn oniṣọnà ati awọn alagbẹdẹ ẹgbẹrun, gbogbo awọn ti o li agbara ti o si yẹ fun ogun, ani awọn li ọba Babeli kó ni igbèkun lọ si Babeli." 
2Kings24:17 Ọba Babeli si fi Mattaniah arakunrin baba rẹ̀ jọba ni ipò rẹ̀, o si pa orukọ rẹ̀ dà si Sedekiah." 
2Kings24:18 Ẹni ọdun mọkanlelogun ni Sedekiah nigbati o bẹ̀rẹ si ijọba, o si jọba li ọdun mọkanla ni Jerusalemu. Orukọ iya rẹ̀ ni Hamutali, ọmọbinrin Jeremiah ti Libna." 
2Kings24:18 Ẹni ọdun mọkanlelogun ni Sedekiah nigbati o bẹ̀rẹ si ijọba, o si jọba li ọdun mọkanla ni Jerusalemu. Orukọ iya rẹ̀ ni Hamutali, ọmọbinrin Jeremiah ti Libna." 
2Kings24:19 O si ṣe eyiti o buru li oju Oluwa, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyiti Jehoiakimu ti ṣe." 
2Kings24:20 Nitori nipa ibinu Oluwa li o ṣẹ si Jerusalemu ati Juda, titi o fi ta wọn nù kuro niwaju rẹ̀; Sedekiah si ṣọ̀tẹ si ọba Babeli." 
2Kings25:1 O si ṣe li ọdun kẹsan ijọba rẹ̀, li oṣù kẹwa, li ọjọ kẹwa oṣù, ni Nebukadnessari ọba Babeli de, on, ati gbogbo ogun rẹ̀, si Jerusalemu, o si dotì i; nwọn si mọdi tì i yika kiri." 
2Kings25:2 A si dotì ilu na titi di ọdun ikọkanla Sedekiah. 
2Kings25:3 Ati li ọjọ kẹsan oṣù kẹrin, iyàn mu gidigidi ni ilu, kò si si onjẹ fun awọn enia ilẹ na." 
2Kings25:4 Ilu na si fọ́, gbogbo awọn ọkunrin ologun si gbà ọ̀na bodè lãrin odi meji, ti o wà leti ọgbà ọba, salọ li oru; (awọn ara Kaldea si yi ilu na kakiri;) ọba si ba ọ̀na pẹ̀tẹlẹ lọ." 
2Kings25:5 Ogun awọn ara Kaldea si lepa ọba, nwọn si ba a ni pẹ̀tẹlẹ Jeriko: gbogbo ogun rẹ̀ si tuka kuro lọdọ rẹ̀." 
2Kings25:6 Bẹ̃ni nwọn mu ọba, nwọn si mu u gòke lọ si ọdọ ọba Babeli ni Ribla; nwọn si sọ ọ̀rọ idajọ lori rẹ̀." 
2Kings25:7 Nwọn si pa awọn ọmọ Sedekiah li oju rẹ̀, nwọn si fọ Sedekiah li oju, nwọn si fi ẹwọn idẹ dè e, nwọn si mu u lọ si Babeli." 
2Kings25:8 Ati li oṣù karun, li ọjọ keje oṣù, ti iṣe ọdun ikọkandilogun Nebukadnessari ọba, ọba Babeli, ni Nebusaradani olori ẹ̀ṣọ, iranṣẹ ọba Babeli, wá si Jerusalemu:" 
2Kings25:9 O si fi ile Oluwa joná, ati ile ọba, ati gbogbo ile Jerusalemu, ati gbogbo ile enia nla li o fi iná sun." 
2Kings25:10 Gbogbo ogun awọn ara Kaldea ti o wà lọdọ olori ẹ̀ṣọ, si wó odi Jerusalemu palẹ yika kiri." 
2Kings25:11 Ati iyokù awọn enia ti o kù ni ilu ati awọn isansa ti o ya tọ̀ ọba, Babeli lọ, pẹlu ọ̀pọlọpọ enia ti o kù, ni Nebusaradani olori ẹ̀ṣọ kó lọ." 
2Kings25:12 Ṣugbọn olori ẹ̀ṣọ fi awọn talakà ilẹ na silẹ, lati mã ṣe alabojuto àjara ati lati mã ṣe aroko." 
2Kings25:13 Ati ọwọ̀n idẹ wọnni ti mbẹ ni ile Oluwa, ati ijoko wọnni, ati agbada-nla idẹ ti o wà ni ile Oluwa, li awọn ara Kaldea fọ tũtu, nwọn si kó idẹ wọn lọ si Babeli." 
2Kings25:14 Ati ikòko wọnni, ati ọkọ wọnni, ati alumagàji fitila wọnni, ati ṣibi wọnni, ati gbogbo ohun-èlo wọnni ti nwọn fi nṣiṣẹ, ni nwọn kó lọ." 
2Kings25:15 Ati ohun ifọnná wọnni, ati ọpọ́n wọnni, eyi ti iṣe ti wura, ni wura, ati eyi ti iṣe ti fadakà ni fadakà, ni olori ẹ̀ṣọ kó lọ." 
2Kings25:16 Awọn ọ̀wọn meji, agbada-nla kan, ati ijoko wọnni ti Solomoni ti ṣe fun ile Oluwa; idẹ ni gbogbo ohun-èlo wọnyi, alaini ìwọn ni." 
2Kings25:17 Giga ọwọ̀n kan ni igbọ̀nwọ mejidilogun, ati ọnà-ori rẹ̀ idẹ ni: ati giga ọnà-ori na ni igbọ̀nwọ mẹta; ati iṣẹ wiwun na, ati awọn pomegranate ti o wà lori ọnà-ori na yika kiri, gbogbo rẹ̀ ti idẹ ni: gẹgẹ bi awọn wọnyi si ni ọwọ̀n keji pẹlu iṣẹ wiwun." 
2Kings25:18 Olori ẹ̀ṣọ si mu Seraiah olori ninu awọn alufa, ati Sefaniah alufa keji, ati awọn olùṣọ iloro mẹta." 
2Kings25:19 Ati lati inu ilu, o mu iwẹ̀fa kan ti a fi ṣe olori awọn ologun, ati ọkunrin marun ninu awọn ti o wà niwaju ọba, ti a ri ni ilu, ati akọwe olori ogun, ti ntò awọn enia ilẹ na, ati ọgọta ọkunrin ninu awọn enia ilẹ na ti a ri ni ilu." 
2Kings25:20 Nebusaradani olori ẹ̀ṣọ si kó awọn wọnyi, o si mu wọn tọ̀ ọba Babeli wá si Ribla." 
2Kings25:21 Ọba Babeli si kọlù wọn, o si pa wọn ni Ribla ni ilẹ Hamati. Bẹ̃li a mu Juda kuro ni ilẹ rẹ̀." 
2Kings25:22 Ati awọn enia ti o kù ni ilẹ Juda, ti Nebukadnessari ọba Babeli fi silẹ, ani, o fi Gedaliah ọmọ Ahikamu, ọmọ Ṣafani, jẹ bãlẹ wọn." 
2Kings25:23 Nigbati gbogbo awọn olori ogun, awọn ati awọn ọkunrin wọn, si gbọ́ pe ọba Babeli ti fi Gedaliah jẹ bãlẹ, nwọn tọ̀ Gedaliah wá ni Mispa, ani Iṣmaeli ọmọ Netaniah, ati Johanani ọmọ Karea, ati Seraiah ọmọ Tanhumeti ara Netofati, ati Jaasaniah ọmọ ara Maaka, awọn ati awọn ọkunrin wọn." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliah si bura fun wọn, ati fun awọn ọkunrin wọn, o si wi fun wọn pe, Ẹ má bẹ̀ru lati sìn awọn ara Kaldea: ẹ mã gbe ilẹ na, ki ẹ si mã sìn ọba Babeli; yio si dara fun nyin." 
2Kings25:25 O si ṣe li oṣù keje, ni Iṣmaeli ọmọ Netaniah, ọmọ Eliṣama ninu iru ọmọ ọba, wá ati ọkunrin mẹwa pẹlu rẹ̀, o si kọlù Gedaliah, o si kú, ati awọn ara Juda ati awọn ara Kaldea ti o wà pẹlu rẹ̀ ni Mispa." 
2Kings25:26 Ati gbogbo enia, ti ewe ti àgba, ati awọn olori ogun, si dide, nwọn si wá si Egipti: nitoriti nwọn bẹ̀ru ara Kaldea." 
2Kings25:27 O si ṣe li ọdun kẹtadilogoji igbèkun Jehoiakini ọba Juda, li oṣù kejila, li ọjọ kẹtadilọgbọn oṣù, Efil-merodaki ọba Babeli, li ọdun ti o bẹ̀rẹ si ijọba, o gbé ori Jehoiakini ọba Juda soke kuro ninu tubu;" 
2Kings25:28 O si sọ̀rọ rere fun u, o si gbé ìtẹ rẹ̀ ga jù ìtẹ awọn ọba ti o wà pẹlu rẹ̀ ni Babeli." 
2Kings25:29 O si pàrọ awọn aṣọ tubu rẹ̀: o si njẹun nigbagbogbo niwaju rẹ̀ ni gbogbo ọjọ aiye rẹ̀. 
2Kings25:30 Ati ipin onjẹ tirẹ̀, jẹ ipin onjẹ ti ọba nfi fun u nigbagbogbo, iye kan li ojojumọ, ni gbogbo ọjọ aiye rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:1 ADAMU, Seti, Enoṣi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaleeli, Jeredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoki, Metusela, Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Ṣemu, Hamu, ati Jafeti," 
1Chronicles1:5 Awọn ọmọ Jafeti; Gomeri, ati Magogu, ati Madai, ati Jafani, ati Tubali, ati Meṣeki, ati Tirasi," 
1Chronicles1:6 Ati awọn ọmọ Gomeri; Aṣkenasi, ati Rifati, ati Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Ati awọn ọmọ Jafani; Eliṣa, ati Tarṣiṣi, Kittimu, ati Dodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Awọn ọmọ Hamu; Kuṣi, ati Misraimu, Puti, ati Kenaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Ati awọn ọmọ Kuṣi; Ṣeba, ati Hafila, ati Sabta, ati Raama, ati Sabteka. Ati awọn ọmọ Raama; Ṣeba ati Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuṣi si bi Nimrodu: on bẹ̀rẹ si di alagbara li aiye. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misraimu si bi Ludimu, ati Anamimu, ati Lehabimu, ati Naftuhimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Ati Patrusimu, ati Kasluhimu, (lọdọ ẹniti awọn ara Filistia ti wá,) ati Kaftorimu." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kenaani si bi Sidoni akọbi rẹ̀, ati Heti," 
1Chronicles1:14 Ati awọn ara Jebusi, ati awọn ara Amori, ati awọn ara Girgaṣi," 
1Chronicles1:15 Ati awọn ara Hifi, ati awọn ara Arki, ati awọn ara Sini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Ati awọn ara Arfadi, ati awọn ara Semari, ati awọn ara Hamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Awọn ọmọ Ṣemu; Elamu, ati Assuri, ati Arfaksadi, ati Ludi, ati Aramu, ati Usi, ati Huli, ati Geteri, ati Meṣeki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arfaksadi si bi Ṣela; Ṣela si bi Eberi. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ati fun Eberi li a bi ọmọkunrin meji: orukọ ọkan ni Pelegi; nitori li ọjọ rẹ̀ li a pin aiye niya: orukọ arakunrin rẹ̀ si ni Joktani. 
1Chronicles1:20 Joktani si bi Almodadi, ati Ṣelefi, ati Hasarmafeti, ati Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Ati Hadoramu, ati Usali, ati Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ati Ebali, ati Abimaeli, ati Ṣeba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ati Ofiri, ati Hafila, ati Jobabu. Gbogbo wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Joktani." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ati Ofiri, ati Hafila, ati Jobabu. Gbogbo wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Joktani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Ṣemu, Arfaksadi, Ṣela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugu, Nahori, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abramu; on na ni Abrahamu," 
1Chronicles1:28 Awọn ọmọ Abrahamu; Isaaki, ati Iṣmaeli." 
1Chronicles1:29 Wọnyi ni iran wọn: akọbi Iṣmaeli, Nebaioti; ati Kedari, ati Adbeeli, ati Mibsamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Miṣma, ati Duma, Massa, Hadadi, ati Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jeturi, Nafiṣi, ati Kedema. Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Iṣmaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ati awọn ọmọ Ketura, obinrin Abrahamu: on bi Simrani, ati Jokṣani, ati Medani, ati Midiani, ati Iṣbaki, ati Ṣua. Ati awọn ọmọ Jokṣani: Ṣeba, ati Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Ati awọn ọmọ Midiani: Efa, ati Eferi, ati Henoki, ati Abida, ani Eldaa. Gbogbo wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamu si bi Isaaki. Awọn ọmọ Isaaki; Esau ati Israeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Awọn ọmọ Esau; Elifasi, Reueli, ati Jeusi, ati Jaalamu, ati Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Awọn ọmọ Elifasi; Temani, ati Omari, Sefi, ati Gatamu, Kenasi, ati Timna, ati Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Awọn ọmọ Reueli: Nahati, Sera, Ṣamma, ati Missa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ati awọn ọmọ Seiri; Lotani, ati Ṣobali, ati Sibeoni, ati Ana, ati Diṣoni, ati Esari, ati Diṣani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ati awọn ọmọ Lotani; Hori, ati Homamu: Timna si ni arabinrin Lotani." 
1Chronicles1:40 Awọn ọmọ Ṣobali; Aliani, ati Manahati, ati Ebali, Ṣefi, ati Onamu. Ati awọn ọmọ Sibeoni; Aiah, ati Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Awọn ọmọ Ana; Diṣoni. Ati awọn ọmọ Diṣoni; Amrani, ati Eṣbani, ati Itrani, ati Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Awọn ọmọ Eseri; Bilhani, ati Safani, ati Jakani. Awọn ọmọ Diṣani; Usi, ati Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Wọnyi si ni awọn ọba ti o jẹ ni ilẹ Edomu, ki ọba kan to jẹ lori awọn ọmọ Israeli: Bela ọmọ Beori: orukọ ilu rẹ̀ si ni Dinhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Nigbati Bela si kú, Jobabu ọmọ Sera ti Bosra si jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:44 Nigbati Bela si kú, Jobabu ọmọ Sera ti Bosra si jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:45 Nigbati Jobabu kú, Huṣamu ti ilẹ awọn ara Temani si jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:45 Nigbati Jobabu kú, Huṣamu ti ilẹ awọn ara Temani si jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:46 Nigbati Huṣamu kú, Hadadi ọmọ Bedadi, ti o kọlu Midiani ni ìgbẹ Moabu, jọba ni ipò rẹ̀: orukọ ilu rẹ̀ ni Afiti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Nigbati Hadadi kú, Samla ti Masreka jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:48 Nigbati Samla kú, Ṣaulu ti Rehoboti leti odò jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:49 Nigbati Ṣaulu kú, Baal-hanani, ọmọ Akbori, jọba ni ipò rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles1:50 Nigbati Baal-hanani kú, Hadadi si jọba ni ipò rẹ̀: orukọ ilu rẹ̀ ni Pai; orukọ aya rẹ̀ si ni Mehetabeeli, ọmọbinrin Matredi, ọmọbinrin Mesahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi si kú. Awọn bãlẹ Edomu ni; Timna bãlẹ, Aliah bãlẹ, Jeteti bãlẹ." 
1Chronicles1:52 Aholibama bãlẹ, Ela bãlẹ, Pinoni bãlẹ," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenasi bãlẹ, Temani bãlẹ, Mibsari bãlẹ," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdieli bãlẹ, Iramu bãlẹ. Wọnyi ni awọn bãlẹ Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 WỌNYI ni awọn ọmọ Israeli; Rubeni, Simeoni, Lefi, ati Juda, Issakari, ati Sebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Josefu, ati Benjamini, Naftali, Gadi, ati Aṣeri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Awọn ọmọ Juda; Eri, ati Onani, ati Ṣela; awọn mẹta yi ni Batṣua, ara Kenaani, bi fun u. Eri, akọbi Juda, si buru loju Oluwa; on si pa a." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamari aya-ọmọ rẹ̀ si bi Faresi ati Sera fun u. Gbogbo awọn ọmọ Juda jẹ marun. 
1Chronicles2:5 Awọn ọmọ Faresi; Hesroni; ati Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Ati awọn ọmọ Sera; Simri, ati Etani, ati Hemani, ati Kalkoli, ati Dara: gbogbo wọn jẹ marun." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ati awọn ọmọ Karmi; Akari, oniyọnu Israeli, ẹniti o dẹṣẹ niti ohun iyasọtọ̀." 
1Chronicles2:8 Awọn ọmọ Etani; Asariah. 
1Chronicles2:9 Awọn ọmọ Hesroni pẹlu ti a bi fun u; Jerahmeeli, ati Ramu, ati Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu si bi Amminadabu; Amminadabu si bi Naṣoni, ijoye awọn ọmọ Juda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Naṣoni si bi Salma, Salma si bi Boasi." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boasi si bi Obedi, Obedi si bi Jesse," 
1Chronicles2:13 Jesse si bi Eliabu akọbi rẹ̀, ati Abinadabu àtẹle, ati Ṣimma ẹkẹta." 
1Chronicles2:14 Netanneeli ẹkẹrin, Raddai ẹkarun," 
1Chronicles2:15 Osemu ẹkẹfa, Dafidi ekeje:" 
1Chronicles2:16 Awọn arabinrin wọn ni Seruiah ati Abigaili. Ati awọn ọmọ Seruiah; Abiṣai, ati Joabu, ati Asaeli, mẹta." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili si bi Amasa: baba Amasa si ni Jeteri ara Iṣmeeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu ọmọ Hesroni si bi ọmọ lati ọdọ Asuba aya rẹ̀, ati lati ọdọ Jeriotu: awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ ni wọnyi; Jeṣeri, ati Ṣohabu, ati Ardoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Nigbati Asuba kú, Kalebu mu Efrati, ẹniti o bi Huri fun u." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri si bi Uru, Uru si bi Besaleeli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Lẹhin na Hesroni si wọle tọ̀ ọmọ Makiri obinrin baba Gileadi, on gbe e ni iyawo nigbati o di ẹni ọgọta ọdun, on si bi Segubu fun u." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu si bi Jairi, ti o ni ilu mẹtalelogun ni ilẹ Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ṣugbọn Geṣuri, ati Aramu, gbà ilu Jairi lọwọ wọn, pẹlu Kenati, ati ilu rẹ̀: ani ọgọta ilu. Gbogbo wọnyi ni awọn ọmọ Makiri baba Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ati lẹhin igbati Hesroni kú ni ilu Kaleb-Efrata, ni Abiah aya Hesroni bi Aṣuri baba Tekoa fun u." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ati awọn ọmọ Jerahmeeli, akọbi Hesroni, ni Rama akọbi, ati Buna, ati Oreni, ati Osemu, ati Ahijah." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahmeeli si ni obinrin miran pẹlu, orukọ ẹniti ijẹ Atara; on ni iṣe iya Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Awọn ọmọ Ramu akọbi Jerahmeeli ni, Maasi, ati Jamini, ati Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Awọn ọmọ Onamu si ni, Ṣammai, ati Jada. Awọn ọmọ Ṣammai ni; Nadabu ati Abiṣuri." 
1Chronicles2:29 Orukọ aya Abiṣuri si njẹ Abihaili, on si bi Abani, ati Molidi fun u." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ati awọn ọmọ Nadabu; Seledi, ati Appaimu: ṣugbọn Seledi kú laini ọmọ." 
1Chronicles2:31 Ati awọn ọmọ Appaimu; Iṣi. Ati awọn ọmọ Iṣi; Ṣeṣani. Ati awọn ọmọ Ṣeṣani. Ahlai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Ati awọn ọmọ Jada arakunrin Ṣammai; Jeteri, ati Jonatani; Jeteri si kú laini ọmọ." 
1Chronicles2:33 Awọn ọmọ Jonatani; Peleti, ati Sasa. Wọnyi ni awọn ọmọ Jerahmeeli." 
1Chronicles2:34 Ṣeṣani kò si ni ọmọkunrin, bikọṣe ọmọbinrin. Ṣeṣani si ni iranṣẹ kan, ara Egipti, orukọ, ẹniti ijẹ Jarha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Ṣeṣani si fi ọmọbinrin rẹ̀ fun Jarha iranṣẹ rẹ̀ li aya; on si bi Attai fun u. 
1Chronicles2:36 Attai si bi Natani, Natani si bi Sabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabadi si bi Eflali, Eflali si bi Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi si bi Jehu, Jehu si bi Asariah," 
1Chronicles2:39 Asariah si bi Helesi, Helesi si bi Elasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Elasa si bi Sisamai, Sisamai si bi Ṣallumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 Ṣallumu si bi Jekamiah, Jekamiah si bi Eliṣama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Awọn ọmọ Kalebu arakunrin Jerahmeeli si ni Meṣa akọbi rẹ̀, ti iṣe baba Sifi; ati awọn ọmọ Mareṣa baba Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Awọn ọmọ Hebroni; Kora, ati Tappua, ati Rekemu, ati Ṣema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Ṣema si bi Rahamu, baba Jorkeamu: Rekemu si bi Ṣammai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ati ọmọ Ṣammai ni Maoni: Maoni si ni baba Bet-suri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa obinrin Kalebu si bi Harani, ati Mosa, ati Gasesi: Harani si bi Gasesi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ati awọn ọmọ Jahdai; Regemu, ati Jotamu, ati Geṣamu, ati Peleti, ati Efa, ati Ṣaafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka obinrin Kalebu bi Ṣeberi, ati Tirhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 On si bi Ṣaafa baba Madmana, Ṣefa baba Makbena, ati baba Gibea: ọmọbinrin Kalebu si ni Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Kalebu ọmọ Huri, akọbi Efrata; Ṣobali baba Kirjat-jearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma baba Bet-lehemu, Harefu baba Bet-gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ati Ṣobali baba Kirjat-jearimu ni ọmọ; Haroe, ati idaji awọn ara Manaheti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ati awọn idile Kirjat-jearimu; awọn ara Itri, ati awọn ara Puti, ati awọn ara Ṣummati, ati awọn ara Misrai; lọdọ wọn li awọn ara Sareati, ati awọn ara Ẹstauli ti wá." 
1Chronicles2:54 Awọn ọmọ Salma; Betlehemu, ati awọn ara Netofati, Ataroti, ile Joabu, ati idaji awọn ara Manahati, awọn ara Sori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ati idile awọn akọwe ti ngbe Jabesi; awọn ara Tira, awọn ara Ṣimeati, ati awọn ara Sukati. Wọnyi li awọn ara Keni ti o ti ọdọ Hemati wá, baba ile Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 WỌNYI li awọn ọmọ Dafidi, ti a bi fun u ni Hebroni; akọbi Amnoni, lati ọdọ Ahinoamu ara Jesreeli; ekeji Danieli, lati ọdọ Abigaili ara Karmeli;" 
1Chronicles3:1 WỌNYI li awọn ọmọ Dafidi, ti a bi fun u ni Hebroni; akọbi Amnoni, lati ọdọ Ahinoamu ara Jesreeli; ekeji Danieli, lati ọdọ Abigaili ara Karmeli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 Ẹkẹta, Absalomu ọmọ Maaka ọmọbinrin Talmai ọba Gesuri; ẹkẹrin, Adonijah ọmọ Haggiti." 
1Chronicles3:3 Ẹkarun, Ṣefatiah lati ọdọ Abitali; ẹkẹfa Itreamu lati ọdọ Ẹgla aya rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles3:4 Awọn mẹfa wọnyi li a bi fun u ni Hebroni; nibẹ li o si jọba li ọdun meje on oṣù mẹfa: ati ni Jerusalemu li o jọba li ọdun mẹtalelọgbọn. 
1Chronicles3:5 Wọnyi li a si bi fun u ni Jerusalemu; Ṣimea, ati Ṣobabu, ati Natani, ati Solomoni, mẹrin, lati ọdọ Batṣua ọmọbinrin Ammieli:" 
1Chronicles3:6 Abhari pẹlu, ati Eliṣama, ati Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Ati Noga, ati Nefegi, ati Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Ati Eliṣama, ati Eliada, ati Elifeleti mẹsan." 
1Chronicles3:9 Wọnyi ni gbogbo awọn ọmọ Dafidi, laika awọn ọmọ àle rẹ̀, ati Tamari arabinrin wọn." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ọmọ Solomoni si ni Rehoboamu, Abia ọmọ rẹ̀, Asa ọmọ rẹ̀, Jehoṣafati ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles3:11 Joramu ọmọ rẹ̀, Ahasiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Joaṣi ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amasiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Asariah ọmọ rẹ̀, Jotamu ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahasi ọmọ rẹ̀, Hesekiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Manasse ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni ọmọ rẹ̀, Josiah ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ati awọn ọmọ Josiah; akọbi Johanani, ekeji Jehoiakimu, ẹkẹta Sedekiah, ẹkẹrin Ṣallumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ati awọn ọmọ Jehoiakimu: Jekoniah ọmọ rẹ̀, Sedekiah ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles3:17 Ati awọn ọmọ Jekoniah; Assiri, Salatieli ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkiramu pẹlu, ati Pedaiah, ati Ṣenasari, Jekamiah, Hoṣama ati Nehabiah," 
1Chronicles3:19 Ati awọn ọmọ Pedaiah; Serubbabeli; ati Ṣimei; ati awọn ọmọ Serubbabeli; Meṣullamu, ati Hananiah, ati Ṣelomiti arabinrin wọn:" 
1Chronicles3:20 Ati Haṣuba, ati Oheli, ati Berekiah, ati Hasadiah, Juṣab-hesedi, marun." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ati awọn ọmọ Hananiah; Pelatiah, ati Jesaiah: awọn ọmọ Refaiah, awọn ọmọ Arnani, awọn ọmọ Obadiah, awọn ọmọ Ṣekaniah." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ati awọn ọmọ Hananiah; Pelatiah, ati Jesaiah: awọn ọmọ Refaiah, awọn ọmọ Arnani, awọn ọmọ Obadiah, awọn ọmọ Ṣekaniah." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ati awọn ọmọ Ṣekaniah; Ṣemaiah; ati awọn ọmọ Ṣemaiah; Hettuṣi, ati Igeali, ati Bariah, ati Neariah, ati Ṣafati, mẹfa." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ati awọn ọmọ Neariah; Elioenai, ati Hesekiah, ati Asrikamu, meta." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ati awọn ọmọ Elioenai ni, Hodaiah, ati Eliaṣibu, ati Pelaiah, ti Akkubu, ati Johanani, ati Dalaiah, ati Anani, meje." 
1Chronicles4:1 AWỌN ọmọ Juda; Faresi, Hesroni, ati Karmi, ati Huri, ati Ṣobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaiah ọmọ Ṣobali si bi Jahati; Jahati si bi Ahumai, ati Lahadi. Wọnyi ni idile awọn ara Sora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Awọn wọnyi li o ti ọdọ baba Etamu wá; Jesreeli ati Jisma, ati Jidbaṣi: orukọ arabinrin wọn si ni Selelponi:" 
1Chronicles4:4 Ati Penueli ni baba Gedori, ati Eseri baba Huṣa. Wọnyi ni awọn ọmọ Huri, akọbi Efrata, baba Betlehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Aṣuri baba Tekoa si li aya meji, Hela ati Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara si bi Ahusamu, ati Heferi, ati Temeni, ati Ahaṣtari fun u. Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ati awọn ọmọ Hela ni Sereti, ati Jesoari, ati Etnani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kosi si bi Anubu, ati Sobeba, ati awọn idile Aharheli, ọmọ Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabesi si ṣe ọlọla jù awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ lọ: iya rẹ̀ si pe orukọ rẹ̀ ni Jabesi, wipe, Nitoriti mo bi i pẹlu ibanujẹ." 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabesi si ké pè Ọlọrun Israeli, wipe, Iwọ iba jẹ bukún mi nitõtọ, ki o si sọ àgbegbe mi di nla, ki ọwọ rẹ ki o si wà pẹlu mi, ati ki iwọ ki o má si jẹ ki emi ri ibi, ki emi má si ri ibinujẹ! Ọlọrun si mu ohun ti o tọrọ ṣẹ." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu arakunrin Ṣua si bi Mehiri, ti iṣe baba Eṣtoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eṣtoni si bi Bet-rafa, ati Pasea, ati Tehinna baba ilu Nahaṣi. Wọnyi li awọn ọkunrin Reka," 
1Chronicles4:13 Ati awọn ọmọ Kenasi; Otnieli, ati Seraiah: ati awọn ọmọ Otnieli; Hatati." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai si bi Ofra: Seraiah si bi Joabu, baba Geharasimu; nitori oniṣọnà ni nwọn." 
1Chronicles4:15 Ati awọn ọmọ Kalebu ọmọ Jefunne; Iru, Ela, ati Naamu: ati awọn ọmọ Ela, ani Kenasi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ati awọn ọmọ Jehaleleeli; Sifu, ati Sifa, Tiria, ati Asareeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ati awọn ọmọ Esra ni Jeteri, ati Meredi, ati Eferi, ati Jaloni: on si bi Miriamu, ati Ṣammai, ati Iṣba baba Eṣtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Aya rẹ̀ Jehudijah si bi Jeredi baba Gedori, ati Heberi baba Soke, ati Jekutieli baba Sanoa. Wọnyi si li awọn ọmọ Bitiah ọmọbinrin Farao ti Meredi mu li aya." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ati awọn ọmọ aya Hodiah, arabinrin Nahamu, baba Keila, ara Garmi, ati Eṣtemoa ara Maaka:" 
1Chronicles4:20 Awọn ọmọ Ṣimoni si ni Amnoni, ati Rinna, Benhanani, ati Tiloni. Ati awọn ọmọ Iṣi ni, Soheti, ati Bensoheti," 
1Chronicles4:21 Awọn ọmọ Ṣela, ọmọ Juda ni, Eri baba Leka, ati Laada baba Mareṣa ati idile ile awọn ti nwọn nwun aṣọ ọ̀gbọ daradara, ti ile Aṣbea," 
1Chronicles4:22 Ati Jokimu, ati awọn ọkunrin Koseba, ati Joaṣi, ati Sarafu, ti o ni ijọba ni Moabu, ati Jaṣubilehemu. Iwe iranti atijọ ni wọnyi." 
1Chronicles4:23 Wọnyi li awọn amọkoko, ati awọn ti ngbe ãrin ọgba ti odi yika; nibẹ ni nwọn ngbe pẹlu ọba fun iṣẹ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles4:24 Awọn ọmọ Simeoni ni, Nemueli, ati Jamini, Jaribi, Sera, Ṣauli:" 
1Chronicles4:25 Ṣallumu ọmọ rẹ̀, Mibsamu ọmọ rẹ̀, Miṣma ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ati awọn ọmọ Miṣma; Hammueli ọmọ rẹ̀, Sakkuri ọmọ rẹ̀, Ṣimei ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles4:27 Ṣimei si ni ọmọkunrin mẹrindilogun, ati ọmọbinrin mẹfa; ṣugbọn awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ kò ni ọmọkunrin pupọ, bẹ̃ni kì iṣe idile wọn gbogbo li o rẹ̀ gẹgẹ bi awọn ọmọ Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Nwọn si ngbe Beerṣeba, ati Molada, ati Haṣari-ṣuali," 
1Chronicles4:29 Ati ni Bilha, ati ni Esemu, ati ni Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Ati ni Betueli, ati ni Horma, ati ni Siklagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Ati ni Bet-markaboti, ati ni Hasar-susimu, ati ni Bet-birei, ati Ṣaaraimu. Awọn wọnyi ni ilu wọn, titi di ijọba Dafidi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ileto wọn si ni, Etamu, ati Aini, Rimmoni, ati Tokeni, ati Aṣani, ilu marun:" 
1Chronicles4:33 Ati gbogbo ileto wọn, ti o wà yi ilu na ka, de Baali. Wọnyi ni ibugbe wọn, ati itan idile wọn." 
1Chronicles4:34 Ati Meṣobabu ati Jamleki, ati Joṣa ọmọ Amasiah." 
1Chronicles4:35 Ati Joeli, ati Jehu ọmọ Josibiah, ọmọ Seraiah, ọmọ Asieli," 
1Chronicles4:35 Ati Joeli, ati Jehu ọmọ Josibiah, ọmọ Seraiah, ọmọ Asieli," 
1Chronicles4:36 Ati Elioenai, ati Jaakoba, ati Jeṣohaiah, ati Asaiah, ati Adieli, ati Jesimieli, ati Benaiah," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ati Sisa ọmọ Ṣifi, ọmọ Alloni, ọmọ Jedaiah, ọmọ Ṣimri ọmọ Ṣemaiah;" 
1Chronicles4:38 Awọn ti a darukọ wọnyi, ìjoye ni wọn ni idile wọn: ile baba wọn si tan kalẹ gidigidi." 
1Chronicles4:39 Nwọn si wọ̀ oju-ọ̀na Gedori lọ, titi de apa ariwa afonifoji na, lati wá koriko fun agbo ẹran wọn." 
1Chronicles4:40 Nwọn si ri koriko tutù ti o si dara; ilẹ na si gbàye, o si gbe jẹ, o si wà li alafia: nitori awọn ọmọ Hamu li o ti ngbe ibẹ li atijọ." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ati awọn wọnyi ti a kọ orukọ wọn, dé li ọjọ Hesekiah ọba Juda, nwọn si kọlu agọ wọn, ati pẹlu awọn ara Mehuni ti a ri nibẹ, nwọn si bà wọn jẹ patapata titi di oni yi, nwọn si ngbe ipò wọn: nitori koriko mbẹ nibẹ fun agbo ẹran wọn." 
1Chronicles4:42 Omiran ninu wọn, ani ninu awọn ọmọ Simeoni, ẹ̃dẹgbẹta ọkunrin, lọ si òke Seiri, nwọn ni Pelatiah, ati Neariah, ati Refaiah ati Ussieli, awọn ọmọ Iṣi li olori wọn." 
1Chronicles4:43 Nwọn si kọlù iyokù awọn ara Amaleki, ti nwọn salà, nwọn si ngbe ibẹ titi di oni yi." 
1Chronicles5:1 NJẸ awọn ọmọ Reubeni, akọbi Israeli, (nitori on li akọbi; ṣugbọn, bi o ti ṣepe o ba ẹní baba rẹ̀ jẹ, a fi ogun ibi rẹ̀ fun awọn ọmọ Josefu ọmọ Israeli: a kì yio si ka itan-idile na gẹgẹ bi ipò ibi." 
1Chronicles5:2 Nitori Juda bori awọn arakunrin rẹ̀, ati lọdọ rẹ̀ ni alaṣẹ ti jade wá; ṣugbọn ogún ibi jẹ ti Josefu:)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Mo ni, awọn ọmọ Rubeni akọbi Israeli ni Hanoku, ati Pallu, Hesroni, ati Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Awọn ọmọ Joeli; Ṣemaiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Gogu ọmọ rẹ̀, Ṣimei ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles5:4 Awọn ọmọ Joeli; Ṣemaiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Gogu ọmọ rẹ̀, Ṣimei ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika ọmọ rẹ̀, Reaiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Baali ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera ọmọ rẹ̀, ti Tiglat-pilneseri ọba Assiria kò ni ìgbekun lọ; ijoye awọn ọmọ Rubeni ni iṣe." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ nipa idile wọn, nigbati a nkà itàn-idile iran wọn, Jeieli, ati Sekariah ni olori." 
1Chronicles5:8 Ati Bela ọmọ Asasi, ọmọ Ṣema, ọmọ Joeli, ti ngbe Aroeri, ani titi de Nebo ati Baalmeoni:" 
1Chronicles5:8 Ati Bela ọmọ Asasi, ọmọ Ṣema, ọmọ Joeli, ti ngbe Aroeri, ani titi de Nebo ati Baalmeoni:" 
1Chronicles5:9 Ati niha ariwa, o tẹ̀do lọ titi de ati-wọ̀ aginju lati odò Eufrate; nitoriti ẹran ọ̀sin wọn pọ̀ si i ni ilẹ Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ati li ọjọ Saulu, nwọn ba awọn ọmọ Hagari jagun, ẹniti o ṣubu nipa ọwọ wọn: nwọn si ngbe inu agọ wọn ni gbogbo ilẹ ariwa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ati awọn ọmọ Gadi ngbe ọkánkan wọn, ni ilẹ Baṣani titi de Salka:" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joeli olori, ati Ṣafamu àtẹle, ati Jaanai, ati Ṣafati ni Baṣani." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joeli olori, ati Ṣafamu àtẹle, ati Jaanai, ati Ṣafati ni Baṣani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Ati awọn arakunrin wọn ti ile awọn baba wọn ni Mikaeli, ati Meṣullamu, ati Ṣeba, ati Jorai, ati Jakani, ati Sia, ati Heberi, meje." 
1Chronicles5:14 Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Abihaili, ọmọ Huri, ọmọ Jaroa, ọmọ Gileadi, ọmọ Mikaeli, ọmọ Jeṣiṣai, ọmọ Jado, ọmọ Busi;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Adi, ọmọ Abdieli, ọmọ Guni, olori ile awọn baba wọn." 
1Chronicles5:16 Nwọn si ngbe Gileadi ni Baṣani, ati ninu awọn ilu rẹ̀, ati ninu gbogbo igberiko Ṣaroni, li àgbegbe wọn." 
1Chronicles5:17 Gbogbo wọnyi li a kà nipa itan-idile, li ọjọ Jotamu ọba Juda, ati li ọjọ Jeroboamu ọba Israeli," 
1Chronicles5:18 Awọn ọmọ Rubeni, ati awọn ọmọ Gadi, ati àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse, ninu awọn ọkunrin alagbara ti nwọn ngbé asà ati idà, ti nwọn si nfi ọrun tafà, ti nwọn si mòye ogun, jẹ ọkẹ meji enia o le ẹgbẹrinlelogún o di ogoji, ti o jade lọ si ogun na." 
1Chronicles5:19 Nwọn si ba awọn ọmọ Hagari jagun, pẹlu Jeturi, ati Nefiṣi ati Nadabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 A si ràn wọn lọwọ si wọn, a si fi awọn ọmọ Hagari le wọn lọwọ, ati gbogbo awọn ti o wà pẹlu wọn: nitoriti nwọn kepè Ọlọrun li ogun na, on si gbọ́ ẹ̀bẹ wọn: nitoriti nwọn gbẹkẹ wọn le e." 
1Chronicles5:21 Nwọn si kó ẹran ọ̀sin wọn lọ; ibakasiẹ ẹgbãmẹ̃dọgbọ̀n ati àgutan ọkẹ mejila o le ẹgbãrun, ati kẹtẹkẹtẹ ẹgbã, ati enia ọkẹ marun." 
1Chronicles5:22 Nitori ọ̀pọlọpọ li o ṣubu ti a pa, nitori lati ọdọ Ọlọrun li ogun na. Nwọn si joko ni ipò wọn titi di igbà ikolọ si ìgbekun." 
1Chronicles5:23 Awọn ọmọkunrin àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse joko ni ilẹ na: nwọn bi si i lati Baṣani titi de Baal-hermoni, ati Seniri, ati titi de òke Hermoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Wọnyi si li awọn olori ile awọn baba wọn, Eferi, ati Iṣi, ati Elieli, ati Asrieli, ati Jeremiah, ati Hodafiah, ati Jahdieli, awọn alagbara akọni ọkunrin, ọkunrin olokiki, ati olori ile awọn baba wọn." 
1Chronicles5:24 Wọnyi si li awọn olori ile awọn baba wọn, Eferi, ati Iṣi, ati Elieli, ati Asrieli, ati Jeremiah, ati Hodafiah, ati Jahdieli, awọn alagbara akọni ọkunrin, ọkunrin olokiki, ati olori ile awọn baba wọn." 
1Chronicles5:25 Nwọn si ṣẹ̀ si Ọlọrun awọn baba wọn, nwọn si ṣe àgbere tọ awọn ọlọrun enia ilẹ na lẹhin, ti Ọlọrun ti parun ni iwaju wọn." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ọlọrun Israeli rú ẹmi Pulu ọba Assiria soke, ati ẹmi Tiglat-pilneseri ọba Assiria, on si kó wọn lọ, ani awọn ọmọ Rubeni ati awọn ọmọ Gadi, ati àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse, o si kó wọn wá si Hala, ati Habori, ati Hara, ati si odò Goṣani, titi di oni yi."

1Chronicles6:2 Ati awọn Kohati; Amramu, Ishari, ati Hebroni, ati Ussieli."

1Chronicles6:4 Eleasari bi Finehasi, Finehasi si bi Abiṣua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abiṣua si bi Bukki, Bukki si bi Ussi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Ussi si bi Serahiah, Serahiah si bi Meraioti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraioti bi Amariah, Amariah si bi Ahitubu."

1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaasi si bi Asariah, Asariah si bi Johanani,"

1Chronicles6:14 Asariah si bi Seraiah, Seraiah si bi Jehosadaki,"

1Chronicles6:36 Ọmọ Elkana, ọmọ Joeli, ọmọ Asariah, ọmọ Sefaniah," 
1Chronicles6:37 Ọmọ Tahati, ọmọ Assiri, ọmọ Ebiasafu, ọmọ Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Ọmọ Ishari, ọmọ Kohati, ọmọ Lefi, ọmọ Israeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Ati arakunrin rẹ̀ Asafu, ti o duro li ọwọ ọ̀tun rẹ̀, ani Asafu, ọmọ Berakiah, ọmọ Ṣimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 Ọmọ Mikaeli, ọmọ Baaseiah, ọmọ Malkiah." 
1Chronicles6:41 Ọmọ Etni, ọmọ Sera, ọmọ Adaiah," 
1Chronicles6:42 Ọmọ Etani, ọmọ Simma, ọmọ Ṣimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Ọmọ Jahati, ọmọ Gerṣomu, ọmọ Lefi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Awọn arakunrin wọn, awọn ọmọ Merari duro lọwọ osi: Etani ọmọ Kiṣi, ọmọ Abdi, ọmọ Malluku," 
1Chronicles6:45 Ọmọ Haṣabiah, ọmọ Amasiah, ọmọ Hilkiah," 
1Chronicles6:46 Ọmọ Amsi, ọmọ Bani, ọmọ Ṣameri." 
1Chronicles6:47 Ọmọ Mahli, ọmọ Muṣi ọmọ Merari, ọmọ Lefi," 
1Chronicles6:48 Arakunrin wọn pẹlu, awọn ọmọ Lefi, li a yàn si oniruru iṣẹ gbogbo ti agọ ile Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles6:49 Ṣugbọn Aaroni ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ nrubọ lori pẹpẹ ẹbọ sisun, ati lori pẹpẹ turari, a si yàn wọn si gbogbo iṣẹ ibi mimọ́-jùlọ, ati lati ṣe ètutu fun Israeli, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyi ti Mose, iranṣẹ Ọlọrun, ti pa li aṣẹ." 
1Chronicles6:50 Wọnyi si li awọn ọmọ Aaroni; Eleasari ọmọ rẹ̀, Finehasi ọmọ rẹ̀, Abiṣua ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:51 Bukki ọmọ rẹ̀, Ussi ọmọ rẹ̀, Serahiah ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraioti ọmọ rẹ̀, Amariah ọmọ rẹ̀, Ahitubu ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:53 Sadoku ọmọ rẹ̀, Ahimaasi ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles6:54 Wọnyi si ni ibùgbe wọn gẹgẹ bi budo wọn li àgbegbe wọn, ti awọn ọmọ Aaroni, ti idile awọn ọmọ Kohati: nitori ti wọn ni ipin ikini." 
1Chronicles6:55 Nwọn si fun wọn ni Hebroni ni ilẹ Juda, ati ìgberiko rẹ̀ yi i kakiri." 
1Chronicles6:56 Ṣugbọn oko ilu na, ati ileto wọn, ni nwọn fun Kalebu ọmọ Jefunne." 
1Chronicles6:57 Nwọn si fi ilu Juda fun awọn ọmọ Aaroni, ani Hebroni, ilu àbo ati Libna pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Jattiri, ati Eṣtemoa, pẹlu ìgberiko wọn," 
1Chronicles6:58 Ati Hileni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, Debiri pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ati Aṣani pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Bet-ṣemeṣi pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles6:60 Ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Benjamini; Geba pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Alemeti pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Anatoti pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀. Gbogbo ilu wọn ni idile wọn jẹ ilu mẹtala." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ati fun awọn ọmọ Kohati, ti o kù ni idile ẹ̀ya na, li a fi keke fi ilu mẹwa fun, ninu àbọ ẹ̀ya, ani lati inu àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ati fun awọn ọmọ Gerṣomu ni idile wọn, lati inu ẹ̀ya Issakari, ati inu ẹ̀ya Aṣeri, ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Naftali, ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Manasse ni Baṣani, ilu mẹtala." 
1Chronicles6:63 Fun awọn ọmọ Merari ni idile wọn li a fi keké fi ilu mejila fun, lati inu ẹ̀ya Reubeni, ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Gadi, ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Sebuluni," 
1Chronicles6:64 Awọn ọmọ Israeli fi ilu wọnyi fun awọn ọmọ Lefi pẹlu ìgberiko wọn. 
1Chronicles6:65 Nwọn si fi keké fi ilu wọnyi ti a da orukọ wọn fun ni lati inu ẹ̀ya awọn ọmọ Juda, ati lati inu ẹ̀ya awọn ọmọ Simeoni, ati lati inu ẹ̀ya awọn ọmọ Benjamini." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ati iyokù ninu idile awọn ọmọ Kohati ni ilu li àgbegbe wọn lati inu ẹ̀ya Efraimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Nwọn si fi ninu ilu àbo fun wọn, Ṣekemu li òke Efraimu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀; Geseri pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:68 Ati Jokneamu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Bet-horoni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ati Aijaloni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Gatrimmoni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles6:70 Ati lati inu àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse; Aneri pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Bileamu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, fun idile awọn ọmọ Kohati iyokù." 
1Chronicles6:71 Awọn ọmọ Gerṣomu lati inu idile àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse li a fi Golani ni Baṣani fun pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀; ati Aṣtaroti pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:72 Ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Issakari; Kadeṣi pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀; Daberati pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ati Ramoti pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Anemu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles6:74 Ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Aṣeri; Maṣali pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Abdoni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles6:75 Ati Hakoku pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Rehobu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles6:76 Ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Naftali; Kedeṣi ni Galili pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Hammoni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Kirjataimu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles6:77 Fun iyokù awọn ọmọ Merari li a fi Rimmoni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀ fun, Tabori pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, lati inu ẹ̀ya Sebuluni:" 
1Chronicles6:78 Ati li apa keji Jordani leti Jeriko, ni iha ariwa Jordani, li a fi Beseri li aginju pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Jasa pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀ fun wọn, lati inu ẹ̀ya Rubeni," 
1Chronicles6:79 Ati Kedemoti pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Mefaati pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles6:80 Ati lati inu ẹ̀ya Gadi, Ramoti ni Gileadi pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Mahanaimu pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles6:81 Ati Heṣboni pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀, ati Jaseri pẹlu ìgberiko rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles7:1 AWỌN ọmọ Issakari si ni, Tola, ati Pua, Jaṣubu, ati Ṣimroni, mẹrin." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ati awọn ọmọ Tola; Ussi, ati Refaiah, ati Jerieli, ati Jamai, ati Jibsamu ati Samueli, awọn olori ile baba wọn, eyini ni ti Tola: akọni alagbara enia ni wọn ni iran wọn; iye awọn ẹniti o jẹ ẹgbã mọkanla o le ẹgbẹta li ọjọ Dafidi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Awọn ọmọ Ussi: Israhiah ati awọn ọmọ Israhiah; Mikaeli, ati Obadiah, ati Joeli, ati Iṣiah, marun: gbogbo wọn li olori." 
1Chronicles7:3 Awọn ọmọ Ussi: Israhiah ati awọn ọmọ Israhiah; Mikaeli, ati Obadiah, ati Joeli, ati Iṣiah, marun: gbogbo wọn li olori." 
1Chronicles7:3 Awọn ọmọ Ussi: Israhiah ati awọn ọmọ Israhiah; Mikaeli, ati Obadiah, ati Joeli, ati Iṣiah, marun: gbogbo wọn li olori." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ati pẹlu wọn, nipa iran wọn, gẹgẹ bi ile baba wọn, ni awọn ẹgbẹ ọmọ-ogun fun ogun, ẹgbã mejidilogun enia: nitoriti nwọn ni ọ̀pọlọpọ obinrin ati ọmọ ọkunrin." 
1Chronicles7:5 Ati awọn arakunrin wọn ninu gbogbo idile Issakari jẹ akọni alagbara enia, ni kikaye gbogbo wọn nipa iran wọn, nwọn jẹ ẹgbamẹtalelogoji o le ẹgbẹrun." 
1Chronicles7:6 Awọn ọmọ Benjamini: Bela, ati Bekeri, ati Jediaeli, mẹta." 
1Chronicles7:7 Awọn ọmọ Bela; Esboni, ati Ussi, ati Ussieli ati Jerimoti ati Iri, marun; awọn olori ile baba wọn, akọni alagbara enia; a si kaye wọn nipa iran wọn si ẹgbãmọkanla enia o le mẹrinlelọgbọ̀n." 
1Chronicles7:8 Awọn ọmọ Bekeri: Semira, ati Joaṣi, ati Elieseri, ati Elioeni, ati Omri, ati Jeremotu, ati Abiah, ati Anatoti, ati Alameti. Gbogbo wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ati iye wọn, ni idile wọn nipa iran wọn, awọn olori ile baba wọn, akọni alagbara enia, jẹ ẹgbawa o le igba." 
1Chronicles7:10 Awọn ọmọ Jediaeli; Bilhani: ati awọn ọmọ Bilhani: Jeuṣi, ati Benjamini, ati Ehudi, ati Kenaana, ati Setani, ati Tarṣiṣi ati Ahisahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Gbogbo awọn wọnyi ọmọ Jediaeli, nipa olori awọn baba wọn, akọni alagbara enia, jẹ ẹgbãjọ o le ẹgbẹfa ọmọ-ogun, ti o le jade lọ si ogun." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ati Ṣuppimu, ati Huppimu, awọn ọmọ Iri, ati Huṣimu, awọn ọmọ Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Awọn ọmọ Naftali: Jasieli, ati Guni, ati Jeseri, ati Ṣallumu, awọn ọmọ Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Awọn ọmọ Manasse; Aṣrieli, ti aya rẹ̀ bi: (ṣugbọn obinrin rẹ̀, ara Aramu, bi Makiri baba Gileadi:" 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri si mu arabinrin Huppimu, ati Ṣuppimu li aya, orukọ arabinrin ẹniti ijẹ Maaka,) ati orukọ ekeji ni Selofehadi: Selofehadi si ni awọn ọmọbinrin." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka, obinrin Makiri, bi ọmọ, on si pè orukọ rẹ̀ ni Pereṣi: orukọ arakunrin rẹ̀ ni Ṣereṣi; ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ ni Ulamu ati Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Awọn ọmọ Ulamu: Bedani. Awọn wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Gileadi, ọmọ Makiri, ọmọ Manasse." 
1Chronicles7:18 Arabinrin rẹ̀, Hammoleketi, bi Iṣodi, ati Abieseri, ati Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ati awọn ọmọ Ṣemida ni, Ahiani, ati Ṣekemu, ati Likki, ati Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Awọn ọmọ Efraimu: Ṣutela, ati Beredi ọmọ rẹ̀, ati Tahati, ọmọ rẹ̀, ati Elada, ọmọ rẹ̀, ati Tahati ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles7:21 Ati Sabadi ọmọ rẹ̀, ati Ṣutela ọmọ rẹ̀, ati Eseri, ati Eleadi, ẹniti awọn ọkunrin Gati, ti a bi ni ilẹ na, pa, nitori nwọn sọkalẹ wá lati kó ẹran ọ̀sin wọn lọ." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efraimu baba wọn si ṣọ̀fọ li ọjọ pupọ, awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ si wá lati tù u ninu." 
1Chronicles7:23 Nigbati o si wọle tọ̀ aya rẹ̀ lọ, o loyun o si bi ọmọ kan, on si pè orukọ rẹ̀ ni Beria, nitoriti ibi ba ile rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ọmọ rẹ̀ obinrin ni Sera, ẹniti o tẹ̀ Bet-horoni dó, ti isalẹ ati ti òke, ati Usseni Ṣera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa si ni ọmọ rẹ̀ ọkunrin, Reṣefu pẹlu, ati Tela ọmọ rẹ̀, ati Tahani ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles7:26 Laadani ọmọ rẹ̀, Ammihudi ọmọ rẹ̀, Eliṣama ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni ọmọ rẹ̀, Joṣua ọmọ rẹ̀," 
1Chronicles7:28 Ati awọn ini ati ibugbe wọn ni Beteli, ati ilu rẹ̀, ati niha ìla-õrùn Naarani, niha ìwọ-õrùn Geseri pẹlu ilu rẹ̀: Ṣekemu pẹlu ati ilu rẹ̀, titi de Gasa ilu rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles7:29 Ati leti ilu awọn ọmọ Manasse, Betṣeani, ati ilu rẹ̀, Taanaki ati ilu rẹ̀, Megiddo ati ilu rẹ̀, Dori ati ilu rẹ̀. Ninu awọn wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Josefu, ọmọ Israeli, ngbe." 
1Chronicles7:30 Awọn ọmọ Aṣeri: Imna, ati Iṣua, ati Iṣuai, ati Beria, ati Sera, arabinrin wọn." 
1Chronicles7:31 Awọn ọmọ Beria: Heberi, ati Malkieli, ti iṣe baba Birsafiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi si bi Jafleti, ati Ṣomeri, ati Hotamu, ati Ṣua, arabinrin wọn." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ati awọn ọmọ Jafleti: Pasaki, ati Bimhali, ati Aṣfati. Wọnyi li awọn omọ Jafleti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Awọn ọmọ Ṣameri: Ahi, ati Roga, Jehubba, ati Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Awọn ọmọ arakunrin rẹ̀ Helemu: Sofa, ati Imna, ati Ṣeleṣi, ati Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Awọn ọmọ Sofa; Sua, ati Harneferi, ati Ṣuali, ati Beri, ati Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Beseri, ati Hodi, ati Ṣamma, ati Ṣilṣa, ati Itrani, ati Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ati awọn ọmọ Jeteri: Jefunne, ati Pispa, ati Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ati awọn ọmọ Ulla: Ara, ati Hanieli, ati Resia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Gbogbo awọn wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Aṣeri, awọn olori ile baba wọn, aṣayan alagbara akọni enia, olori ninu awọn ijoye. Iye awọn ti a kà yẹ fun ogun, ati fun ijà ni idile wọn jẹ, ẹgbã mẹtala ọkunrin." 
1Chronicles8:1 BENJAMINI si bi Bela, akọbi rẹ̀, Aṣbeli ekeji, ati Ahara ẹkẹta," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha ẹkẹrin, ati Rafa ẹkarun." 
1Chronicles8:3 Awọn ọmọ Bela ni Addari, ati Gera, ati Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Ati Abiṣua, ati Naamani, ati Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Ati Gera, ati Ṣefufani, ati Huramu," 
1Chronicles8:6 Wọnyi si li awọn ọmọ Ehudi: wọnyi li awọn olori baba wọn, ti nwọn ngbe Geba, nwọn si ko wọn lọ si Mahanati ni igbekun." 
1Chronicles8:7 Ati Naamani, ati Ahiah, ati Gera, o si ko wọn kuro, o si bi Ussa ati Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Ṣaharaimu si bi ọmọ ni ilẹ Moabu; lẹhin igbati o ti ran wọn lọ tan; Huṣimu ati Baera si li awọn aya rẹ̀. 
1Chronicles8:9 Hodeṣi, aya rẹ̀ si bi, Jobabu, ati Sibia, ati Meṣa, ati Malkama fun u," 
1Chronicles8:9 Hodeṣi, aya rẹ̀ si bi, Jobabu, ati Sibia, ati Meṣa, ati Malkama fun u," 
1Chronicles8:10 Ati Jeusi, ati Ṣokia, ati Mirma. Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ rẹ̀, olori awọn baba." 
1Chronicles8:11 Huṣimu si bi Ahitubu ati Elpaali fun u. 
1Chronicles8:12 Awọn ọmọ Elpaali, Eberi, ati Miṣamu ati Ṣameri, ẹniti o kọ́ Ono ati Lodi pẹlu ilu wọn:" 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria pẹlu, ati Ṣema, ti nwọn iṣe olori awọn baba awọn ara Ajaloni, awọn ti o le awọn ara Gati kuro." 
1Chronicles8:14 Ati Ahio, Ṣaṣaki, Jerimotu," 
1Chronicles8:15 Ati Sebadiah, ati Aradi, ati Aderi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Ati Mikaeli, ati Ispa, ati Joha, ni awọn ọmọ Beria;" 
1Chronicles8:17 Ati Sobadiah, ati Meṣullamu, ati Heseki, ati Heberi." 
1Chronicles8:18 Iṣmeri pẹlu, ati Jeslia, ati Jobabu, ni awọn ọmọ Elpaali." 
1Chronicles8:18 Iṣmeri pẹlu, ati Jeslia, ati Jobabu, ni awọn ọmọ Elpaali." 
1Chronicles8:19 Ati Jakimu, ati Sikri, ati Sabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Ati Elienai, ati Siltai, ati Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Ati Adaiah, ati Beraiah, ati Ṣimrati ni awọn ọmọ Ṣimhi;" 
1Chronicles8:22 Ati Iṣpani, ati Eberi, ati Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Ati Abdoni, ati Sikri, ati Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Ati Hananiah, ati Elamu, ati Antotiah," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ati Ifediah, ati Penueli, ni awọn ọmọ Ṣaṣaki;" 
1Chronicles8:26 Ati Samṣerai, ati Sehariah, ati Ataliah," 
1Chronicles8:27 Ati Jaresiah, ati Eliah, ati Sikri, ni awọn ọmọ Jerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Wọnyi li olori awọn baba, nipa iran wọn, awọn olori. Awọn wọnyi ni ngbe Jerusalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ni Gibeoni ni baba Gibeoni si ngbe; orukọ aya ẹniti ijẹ Maaka: 
1Chronicles8:30 Ọmọ rẹ̀ akọbi si ni Abdoni, ati Suri, ati Kiṣi, ati Baali, ati Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Ati Gedori, ati Ahio, ati Sakeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 Mikloti si bi Ṣimea. Awọn wọnyi pẹlu si mba awọn arakunrin wọn gbe Jerusalemu, nwọn kọju si ara wọn." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri si bi Kiṣi, ati Kiṣi si bi Saulu, ati Saulu si bi Jonatani, ati Milkiṣua, ati Abinadabu, ati Esbaali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ọmọ Jonatani si ni Meribaali; Meribaali si bi Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Awọn ọmọ Mika ni Pitoni ati Meleki, ati Tarea, ati Ahasi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahasi si bi Jehoadda; ati Jehoadda si bi Alemeti, ati Asmafeti, ati Simri: Simri si bi Mosa;" 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa si bi Binea, Rafa ọmọ rẹ̀, Eleasari ọmọ rẹ̀, Aseli ọmọ rẹ̀:" 
1Chronicles8:38 Aseli si ni ọmọkunrin mẹfa, orukọ wọn ni wọnyi, Asrikamu, Bokeru, ati Iṣmaeli, ati Seraiah, ati Obadiah, ati Hanani. Gbogbo awọn wọnyi li ọmọ Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Aseli si ni ọmọkunrin mẹfa, orukọ wọn ni wọnyi, Asrikamu, Bokeru, ati Iṣmaeli, ati Seraiah, ati Obadiah, ati Hanani. Gbogbo awọn wọnyi li ọmọ Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Awọn ọmọ Eṣeki arakunrin rẹ̀ si ni Ulamu akọbi rẹ̀, Jehuṣi ekeji, ati Elifeleti ẹkẹta." 
1Chronicles8:40 Awọn ọmọ Ulamu si jẹ alagbara akọni ọkunrin, tafatafa, nwọn si li ọmọ pupọ ati ọmọ ọmọ adọjọ. Gbogbo wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Benjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 A si ka iye gbogbo Israeli ni idile idile wọn; si kiyesi i, a kọ wọn sinu iwe awọn ọba Israeli: Juda li a si kó lọ si Babiloni nitori ẹ̀ṣẹ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles9:2 Awọn ti o tetekọ gbe ilẹ ini wọn, ati ilu wọn li awọn ọmọ Israeli, awọn alufa, ati awọn ọmọ Lefi ati awọn Netinimu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ni Jerusalemu ni, ninu awọn ọmọ Juda, ati ninu awọn ọmọ Benjamini, ati ninu awọn ọmọ Efraimu, ati Manasse ngbe;" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai ọmọ Ammihudi, ọmọ Omri, ọmọ Imri, ọmọ Bani, ninu awọn ọmọ Faresi ọmọ Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ati ninu awọn ara Ṣilo, Asaiah akọbi, ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Sera, Jegueli, ati awọn arakunrin wọn, ẹdẹgbẹrin o di mẹwa." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Benjamini; Sallu, ọmọ Meṣullamu, ọmọ Hodafiah, ọmọ Senua." 
1Chronicles9:8 Ati Ibneiah ọmọ Jerohamu, ati Ela ọmọ Ussi, ọmọ Mikri, ati Meṣullamu ọmọ Ṣefatiah, ọmọ Regueli, ọmọ Ibniah;" 
1Chronicles9:9 Ati awọn arakunrin wọn, gẹgẹ bi idile wọn ẹgbẹrun o din mẹrinlelogoji. Gbogbo awọn ọkunrin wọnyi ni olori ninu awọn baba ni ile baba wọn." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ati ninu awọn alufa; Jedaiah, ati Jehoiaribu ati Jakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 Ati Asariah ọmọ Hilkiah, ọmọ Meṣullamu, ọmọ Sadoku, ọmọ Meraiotu, ọmọ Ahitubu olori ile Ọlọrun;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Ati Adaiah ọmọ Jerohamu, ọmọ Paṣuri, ọmọ Malkijah, ati Maasai ọmọ Adieli, ọmọ Jasera, ọmọ Meṣullamu, ọmọ Meṣillemiti, ọmọ Immeri;" 
1Chronicles9:13 Ati awọn arakunrin wọn olori ile baba wọn, ẹgbẹsan o din ogoji; awọn alagbara akọni ọkunrin fun iṣẹ ìsin ile Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Lefi; Ṣemaiah ọmọ Haṣubu, ọmọ Asrikamu, ọmọ Haṣabiah, ninu awọn ọmọ Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Ati Bakbakkari, Hereṣi, ati Galali, ati Mattaniah ọmọ Mika, ọmọ Sikri, ọmọ Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Ati Obadiah ọmọ Ṣemaiah, ọmọ Galali, ọmọ Jedutuni, ati Berekiah ọmọ Asa, ọmọ Elkanah, ti ngbe ileto awọn ara Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:16 Ati Obadiah ọmọ Ṣemaiah, ọmọ Galali, ọmọ Jedutuni, ati Berekiah ọmọ Asa, ọmọ Elkanah, ti ngbe ileto awọn ara Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Awọn adena si ni Ṣallumu, ati Akkubu, ati Talmoni, ati Ahimani, ati awọn arakunrin wọn; Ṣallumu li olori;" 
1Chronicles9:18 Titi di isisiyi awọn ti o duro li oju-ọ̀na ọba niha ilà-õrùn; adena ni wọn li ẹgbẹ awọn ọmọ Lefi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Ati Ṣallumu ọmọ Kore, ọmọ Ebiasafu, ọmọ Kora, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀, ti ile baba rẹ̀, awọn ọmọ Kora, ni mbẹ lori iṣẹ ìsin na, olutọju iloro agọ na; awọn baba wọn ti mbẹ lori ibudo Oluwa ti nwọn ima ṣọ atiwọ̀le na." 
1Chronicles9:20 Ati Finehasi ọmọ Eleasari ni olori lori wọn ni igba atijọ, Oluwa si wà pẹlu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sekariah ọmọ Meṣelemiah ni adena ilẹkun agọ ajọ enia. 
1Chronicles9:22 Gbogbo wọnyi ti a ti yàn lati ṣe adena loju iloro, jẹ igba o le mejila. A ka awọn wọnyi nipa idile wọn ni ileto wọn, awọn ẹniti Dafidi ati Samueli, ariran, ti yàn nitori otitọ wọn." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bẹ̃li awọn wọnyi ati awọn ọmọ wọn nṣẹ abojuto iloro ile Oluwa, eyini ni ile agọ na fun iṣọ." 
1Chronicles9:24 Ni igun mẹrẹrin ni awọn adena mbẹ, niha ilà-õrùn, ìwọ-õrún, ariwa ati gusu." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ati awọn arakunrin wọn ngbe ileto wọn, lati ma wá pẹlu wọn ni ijọ ekeje lati igba de igba." 
1Chronicles9:26 Nitoriti awọn ọmọ Lefi wọnyi jẹ awọn olori adena mẹrin, nwọn si wà ninu iṣẹ na, nwọn si wà lori iyara ati ibi iṣura ile Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles9:27 Nwọn a si ma sùn yi ile Ọlọrun ka, nitori ti nwọn ni itọju na, ati ṣiṣi rẹ̀ li orowurọ jẹ ti wọn." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ati awọn kan ninu wọn ni itọju ohun elo ìsin, lati ma kó wọn sinu ile ati si ode ni iye." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ninu wọn li a yàn lati ma bojuto ohun elo, ati gbogbo ohun elo ibi mimọ́, ati iyẹfun kikunna, ati ọti-waini, ati ororo, ati ojia, ati turari." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ati omiran ninu awọn ọmọ awọn alufa si fi turari ṣe ororo. 
1Chronicles9:31 Ati Mattitiah, ọkan ninu awọn ọmọ Lefi, ti iṣe akọbi Ṣallumu ọmọ Kora, li o nṣe alabojuto iṣẹ ohun ti a ndín." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ati ninu awọn arakunrin wọn ninu awọn ọmọ Kohati li o nṣe itọju akara-ifihan, lati mã pese rẹ̀ li ọjọjọ isimi." 
1Chronicles9:33 Wọnyi si li awọn akọrin, olori awọn baba awọn ọmọ Lefi, nwọn kò ni iṣẹ ninu iyara wọnni; nitori ti nwọn wà lẹnu iṣẹ wọn lọsan ati loru." 
1Chronicles9:34 Awọn wọnyi ni olori baba awọn ọmọ Lefi, ni iran wọn, olori ni nwọn: awọn wọnyi ni ngbe Jerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ati ni Gibeoni ni baba Gibeoni ngbe, Jegieli, orukọ aya ẹniti ijẹ Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Akọbi ọmọ rẹ̀ si ni Abdoni, ati Suri ati Kiṣi, ati Baali, ati Neri, ati Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Ati Gedori, ati Ahio, ati Sekariah ati Mikloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikloti si bi Ṣimeamu. Awọn wọnyi si mba awọn arakunrin wọn gbe ni Jerusalemu, kọju si awọn arakunrin wọn." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri si bi Kiṣi, Kiṣi si bi Saulu, Saulu si bi Jonatani, ati Malkiṣua, ati Abinadabu, ati Eṣbaali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Ati ọmọ Jonatani ni Merib-baali; Merib-baali si bi Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Ati awọn ọmọ Mika ni Pitoni, ati Meleki, ati Tarea, ati Ahasi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahasi si bi Jara; Jara si bi Alemeti, ati Asmafeti, ati Simri, Simri si bi Mosa," 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa si bi Binea, ati Refaiah ọmọ rẹ̀, Eleasa ọmọ rẹ̀, Aseli ọmọ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles9:44 Aseli si bi ọmọ mẹfa, orukọ wọn ni wọnyi; Asrikamu, Bokeru, ati Iṣmaeli, ati Ṣeariah, ati Obadiah ati Hanani. Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Aseli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Aseli si bi ọmọ mẹfa, orukọ wọn ni wọnyi; Asrikamu, Bokeru, ati Iṣmaeli, ati Ṣeariah, ati Obadiah ati Hanani. Wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Aseli." 
1Chronicles10:1 AWỌN ara Filistia si ba Israeli jagun, awọn ọkunrin Israeli si sá niwaju awọn ara Filistia, nwọn fi ara pa, nwọn si ṣubu li òke Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Awọn ara Filistia si lepa Saulu kikan, ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀: awọn ara Filistia si pa Jonatani, ati Abinadabu, ati Melkiṣua, awọn ọmọ Saulu." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ogun na si le fun Saulu, awọn tafàtafà si ba a, on si damu nitori awọn tafàtafà." 
1Chronicles10:4 Nigbana ni Saulu wi fun ẹniti o ru ihamọra rẹ̀ pe, Fa idà rẹ yọ, ki o si fi gun mi, ki awọn alaikọla wọnyi ki o má ba wá fi mi ṣẹsin. Ṣugbọn ẹniti o ru ihamọra rẹ̀ kọ̀, nitori ẹ̀ru ba a gidigidi. Bẹ̃ni Saulu si mu idà, o si ṣubu le e." 
1Chronicles10:5 Nigbati ẹniti o ru ihamọra rẹ̀ si ri pe Saulu kú, on na pẹlu si ṣubu le idà rẹ̀, o si kú." 
1Chronicles10:6 Bẹ̃ni Saulu kú, ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ mẹtẹta, gbogbo ile rẹ̀ si kú ṣọkan." 
1Chronicles10:7 Nigbati gbogbo awọn ọkunrin Israeli ti o wà ni pẹtẹlẹ ri pe nwọn sá, ati pe Saulu ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ kú, nwọn fi ilu wọn silẹ, nwọn si sá: awọn ara Filistia si wá; nwọn si joko ninu wọn." 
1Chronicles10:8 O si ṣe ni ijọ keji, nigbati awọn ara Filistia de lati wá bọ́ awọn okú li aṣọ, nwọn si ri Saulu pẹlu, ati awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ pe; nwọn ṣubu li òke Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Nwọn si bọ́ ọ li aṣọ, nwọn si gbé ori rẹ̀ ati ihamọra rẹ̀, nwọn si ranṣẹ si awọn ara Filistia yika, lati mu ihin lọ irò fun awọn ere wọn, ati fun awọn enia." 
1Chronicles10:10 Nwọn si fi ihamọra rẹ̀ sinu ile oriṣa wọn, nwọn si kan agbari rẹ̀ mọ ile Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Nigbati gbogbo Jabeṣ-gileadi gbọ́ gbogbo eyi ti awọn ara Filistia ti ṣe si Saulu," 
1Chronicles10:12 Nwọn dide, gbogbo awọn ọkunrin ogun, nwọn si gbé okú Saulu lọ, ati okú awọn ọmọ rẹ̀, nwọn wá si Jabeṣi, nwọn si sìn egungun wọn labẹ igi oaku ni Jabeṣi, nwọn si gbawẹ ni ijọ meje." 
1Chronicles10:13 Bẹ̃ni Saulu kú ninu ẹ̀ṣẹ rẹ̀ ti o da si Oluwa, nitori ọ̀rọ Oluwa, ti on kò kiyesi, ati pẹlu nitori o lọ bère ọ̀ràn lọwọ abokusọrọ, lati ṣe ibere." 
1Chronicles10:14 Kò si bère lọwọ Oluwa; nitorina li o ṣe pa a, o si yi ijọba na pada sọdọ Dafidi ọmọ Jesse." 
1Chronicles11:1 NIGBANA ni gbogbo Israeli ko ara wọn jọ si ọdọ Dafidi ni Hebroni, wipe, Kiyesi i, egungun rẹ ati ẹran ara rẹ li awa iṣe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ati pẹlu li atijọ, ani nigbati Saulu jẹ ọba, iwọ li o nmu Israeli jade ti o si nmu u wá ile: Oluwa Ọlọrun rẹ si wi fun ọ pe, Ki iwọ ki o bọ Israeli, enia mi, ki iwọ ki o si ṣe ọmọ-alade lori Israeli enia mi." 
1Chronicles11:3 Nitorina ni gbogbo awọn agbagba Israeli ṣe tọ ọba wá ni Hebroni; Dafidi si ba wọn da majẹmu ni Hebroni niwaju Oluwa; nwọn si fi ororo yan Dafidi li ọba lori Israeli, gẹgẹ bi ọ̀rọ Oluwa nipa ọwọ Samueli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Ati Dafidi ati gbogbo Israeli jade lọ si Jerusalemu, ti iṣe Jebusi; awọn Jebusi ara ilẹ na ngbe ibẹ̀." 
1Chronicles11:5 Awọn ara ilu Jebusi si wi fun Dafidi pe, Iwọ kò gbọdọ wọ̀ ihinyi wa. Ṣugbọn Dafidi kó ilu odi Sioni ti iṣe ilu Dafidi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dafidi si wipe, Ẹnikẹni ti o ba tetekọ kọlù awọn ara Jebusi ni yio ṣe olori ati balogun. Bẹ̃ni Joabu ọmọ Seruiah si tetekọ gòke lọ, o si jẹ olori." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dafidi si ngbe inu ilu odi, nitorina ni nwọn fi npè e ni ilu Dafidi." 
1Chronicles11:8 O si kọ́ ilu na yikakiri; ani lati Millo yikakiri: Joabu si tun iyokù ilu na ṣe. 
1Chronicles11:9 Bẹ̃ni Dafidi nga, o si npọ̀ si i: nitori ti Oluwa awọn ọmọ-ogun wà pẹlu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles11:10 Wọnyi si ni olori awọn ọkunrin akọni ti Dafidi ni; awọn ti o fi ara wọn mọ ọ girigiri ni ijọba rẹ̀, pẹlu gbogbo Israeli, lati fi i jọba, gẹgẹ bi ọ̀rọ Oluwa fun Israeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Eyi ni iye awọn ọkunrin akọni ti Dafidi ni; Jaṣobeamu ọmọ Hakmoni, olori ninu awọn ọgbọ̀n balogun: on li o gbé ọ̀kọ rẹ̀ soke si ọ̃dunrun enia ti o pa lẹrikan." 
1Chronicles11:12 Lẹhin rẹ̀ ni Eleaseri ọmọ Dodo, ara Ahohi, ẹniti iṣe ọkan ninu awọn akọni mẹta." 
1Chronicles11:13 On wà pẹlu Dafidi ni Pasdammimu, nigbati awọn ara Filistia ko ara wọn jọ lati jagun, nibiti ilẹ-bĩri kan wà ti o kún fun ọkà barli; awọn enia si salọ kuro niwaju awọn ara Filistia." 
1Chronicles11:14 Nwọn si duro jẹ li ãrin ilẹ-bĩri na, nwọn si gbà a, nwọn si pa awọn ara Filistia; Oluwa si fi igbala nla gbà wọn." 
1Chronicles11:15 Awọn mẹta ninu awọn ọgbọ̀n balogun si sọ̀kalẹ tọ̀ Dafidi lọ sibi apata na, ninu iho Adullamu; ogun ara Filistia si do li afonifoji Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Dafidi si mbẹ ninu ilu odi nigbana, ẹgbẹ-ogun awọn ara Filistia si mbẹ ni Betlehemu li akoko na." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dafidi si pòngbẹ, o si wipe, Emi iba ri ẹni fun mi mu ninu omi kanga Betlehemu ti mbẹ leti ẹnu-bodè!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Awọn mẹta na si la inu ogun awọn ara Filistia kọja, nwọn si fa omi jade lati inu kanga Betlehemu, lati ẹnu-bodè, nwọn gbé e, nwọn si mu u tọ̀ Dafidi wá: Dafidi kò si fẹ mu u, ṣugbọn o tu u silẹ fun Oluwa," 
1Chronicles11:19 O si wipe, Ki Ọlọrun mi má jẹ ki emi ki o ṣe eyi: ki emi ki o ha mu ẹ̀jẹ awọn ọkunrin wọnyi, ti nwọn fi ẹmi wọn wewu? nipa ẹmi wọn ni nwọn fi mu u wá. Nitorina ni on kò ṣe fẹ mu u, nkan wọnyi li awọn akọni mẹta wọnyi ṣe." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ati Abiṣai arakunrin Joabu, on li olori ninu awọn mẹta: nitoriti o gbé ọ̀kọ rẹ̀ soke si ọ̃dunrun o pa wọn, o si ni orukọ ninu awọn mẹta." 
1Chronicles11:21 O ni ọla jù awọn mẹta ẹgbẹ ekeji lọ o si jẹ olori wọn: ṣugbọn kò to awọn mẹta iṣaju. 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaiah, ọmọ Jehoiada, ọmọ akọni ọkunrin kan ti Kabseeli, ẹniti o pọ̀ ni iṣe agbara, o pa awọn ọmọ Arieli meji ti Moabu; on sọkalẹ, o si pa kiniun kan ninu iho lakoko sno." 
1Chronicles11:23 O si pa ara Egipti kan, ọkunrin ti o si sigbọnlẹ igbọnwọ marun ni gigun rẹ̀; ati li ọwọ ara Egipti na ni ọ̀kọ kan wà bi idubu igi awunṣọ; o si sọ̀kalẹ tọ ọ lọ pẹlu ọpa, a si já ọ̀kọ li ọwọ ara Egipti na, o si fi ọ̀kọ rẹ̀ pa a." 
1Chronicles11:24 Nkan wọnyi ni Benaiah ọmọ Jehoiada ṣe, o si li orukọ ninu awọn akọni mẹta." 
1Chronicles11:25 Kiyesi i, o li ọla jù awọn ọ̀gbọn lọ, ṣugbọn kò to awọn mẹta iṣaju. Dafidi si fi ṣe olori awọn igbimọ ile rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles11:26 Awọn akọni ọkunrin ọmọ ogun rẹ̀ ni Asaheli arakunrin Joabu, Elhanani, ọmọ Dodo, ara Betlehemu." 
1Chronicles11:27 Sammotu, ara Harori, Helesi, ara Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira, ọmọ Ikkeṣi, ara Tekoa, Abieseri ara Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibbekai, ara Husa, Ilai, ara Ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai, ara Netofa, Heledi ọmọ Baana, ara Netofa." 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai ọmọ Ribai ti Gibea, ti awọn ọmọ Benjamini, Benaiah ara Piratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai ti odò Gaaṣi, Abieli ara Arbati," 
1Chronicles11:33 Asmafeti ara Baharumi, Eliaba ara Ṣaalboni." 
1Chronicles11:34 Awọn ọmọ Haṣemu ara Gisoni, Jonatani ọmọ Sage, ara Harari." 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahihamu ọmọ Sakari, ara Harari, Elifali ọmọ Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi ara Mekerati, Ahijah ara Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesro ara Karmeli, Naari ọmọ Esbai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Joeli arakunrin Natani, Mibhari ọmọ Haggeri," 
1Chronicles11:38 Joeli arakunrin Natani, Mibhari ọmọ Haggeri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Saleki ara Ammoni, Naharai ara Beroti, ẹniti nru ihamọra Joabu ọmọ Seruiah," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira ara Itri, Garobu ara Itri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriah ara Heti, Sabadi ọmọ Ahalai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina ọmọ Ṣisa ara Reubeni, olori awọn ara Reubeni, ati ọgbọ̀n enia pẹlu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani ọmọ Maaka, ati Jehoṣafati ara Mitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ussia ara Aslerati, Ṣama ati Jegieli, awọn ọmọ Hotani, ara Aroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediaeli ọmọ Simri, ati Joha arakunrin rẹ̀ ara Tisi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli ara Mahafi, ati Jeribai, ati Joṣafia, awọn ọmọ Elnaamu, ati Tima ara Moabu." 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, ati Obedi, ati Jasieli ara Mesobah." 
1Chronicles12:1 WỌNYI si li awọn ti o tọ̀ Dafidi wá si Siklagi, nigbati o fi ara rẹ̀ pamọ, nitori Saulu ọmọ Kiṣi: awọn wọnyi si wà ninu awọn akọni ti nṣe oluranlọwọ ogun na." 
1Chronicles12:2 Nwọn le tafa, nwọn si le fi ọwọ ọtún ati ọwọ ọ̀si sọ okuta, ati fi ọrun tafa, ani ninu awọn arakunrin Saulu ti Benjamini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahieseri ni olori, ati Joaṣi, awọn ọmọ Ṣemaa ara Gibea; ati Jesieli ati Peleti, awọn ọmọ Asmafeti; ati Beraka, ati Jehu ara Anatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 Ati Ismaiah ara Gibeoni, akọni ninu awọn ọgbọ̀n, ati lori ọgbọ̀n (enia) ati Jeremiah, ati Jahasieli, ati Johanani, ati Josabadi ara Gedera." 
1Chronicles12:4 Ati Ismaiah ara Gibeoni, akọni ninu awọn ọgbọ̀n, ati lori ọgbọ̀n (enia) ati Jeremiah, ati Jahasieli, ati Johanani, ati Josabadi ara Gedera." 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai ati Jeremoti, ati Bealiah, ati Ṣemariah, ati Ṣefatiah ara Harofi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana, ati Jesiah, ati Asareelti ati Joeseri, ati Jaṣobeamu, awọn ara Kora," 
1Chronicles12:7 Ati Joela, ati Sebadiah, awọn ọmọ Jerohamu ti Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:7 Ati Joela, ati Sebadiah, awọn ọmọ Jerohamu ti Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ati ninu awọn ara Gadi, awọn ọkunrin akọni kan ya ara wọn sọdọ Dafidi ninu iho ni iju, awọn ọkunrin ogun ti o yẹ fun ija ti o le di asà on ọ̀kọ mu, oju awọn ẹniti o dabi oju kiniun, nwọn si yara bi agbọnrin lori awọn òke nla;" 
1Chronicles12:9 Eseri ekini, Obadiah ekeji, Eliobu ẹkẹta," 
1Chronicles12:9 Eseri ekini, Obadiah ekeji, Eliobu ẹkẹta," 
1Chronicles12:10 Miṣmanna ẹkẹrin, Jeremiah ẹkarun," 
1Chronicles12:10 Miṣmanna ẹkẹrin, Jeremiah ẹkarun," 
1Chronicles12:11 Attai ẹkẹfa, Elieli ekeje," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanani ẹkẹjọ, Elsabadi ẹkẹsan," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremiah ẹkẹwa, Makbanai ẹkọkanla." 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremiah ẹkẹwa, Makbanai ẹkọkanla." 
1Chronicles12:14 Awọn wọnyi li awọn ọmọ Gadi, awọn olori ogun: ẹniti o kere jù to fun ọgọrun enia, ati ẹniti o pọ̀ju to fun ẹgbẹrun." 
1Chronicles12:15 Wọnyi li awọn ti o gòke odò Jordani li oṣù ekini, nigbati o kún bò gbogbo bèbe rẹ̀; nwọn si le gbogbo awọn ti o wà li afonifoji ninu ila-õrùn, ati niha iwọ-õrùn." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ninu awọn ọmọ Benjamini ati Juda si tọ Dafidi wá lori òke. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dafidi si jade lọ ipade wọn, o si dahun o si wi fun wọn pe, Bi o ba ṣepe ẹnyin tọ̀ mi wá li alafia lati ràn mi lọwọ, ọkàn mi yio ṣọkan pẹlu nyin: ṣugbọn bi o ba ṣepe ẹnyin wá lati fi mi hàn fun awọn ọta mi, nigbati ẹbi kò si lọwọ mi, ki Ọlọrun awọn baba wa ki o wò o, ki o si ṣe idajọ." 
1Chronicles12:18 Nigbana ni ẹmi bà lé Amasai, ti iṣe olori awọn ọgbọn na, wipe, Tirẹ li awa, Dafidi, tirẹ li a si nṣe, iwọ ọmọ Jesse: alafia! alafia ni fun ọ! alafia si ni fun awọn oluranlọwọ rẹ; nitori Ọlọrun rẹ ni nràn ọ lọwọ. Dafidi si gbà wọn, o si fi wọn jẹ olori ẹgbẹ-ogun." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ninu ẹyà Manasse si ya si ọdọ Dafidi, nigbati o ba awọn ara Filistia wá lati ba Saulu jagun, ṣugbọn nwọn kò ràn wọn lọwọ: nitori awọn olori awọn ara Filistia, nigbati nwọn gbero, rán a lọ wipe, Ti on ti ori wa ni on o fi pada lọ si ọdọ Saulu oluwa rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles12:20 Bi on ti lọ si Siklagi, ninu awọn ẹya Manasse ya si ọdọ rẹ̀, Adna, ati Josabadi, Jediaeli, ati Mikaeli, ati Josabadi ati Elihu, ati Sittai, awọn olori ẹgbẹgbẹrun ti iṣe ti Manasse." 
1Chronicles12:21 Nwọn si ràn Dafidi lọwọ si ẹgbẹ ogun na; nitori gbogbo wọn ni akọni enia, nwọn si jẹ olori ninu awọn ọmọ-ogun." 
1Chronicles12:22 Nitori li akokò na li ojojumọ ni nwọn ntọ Dafidi wá lati ran a lọwọ, titi o fi di ogun nla, gẹgẹ bi ogun Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles12:23 Eyi ni iye awọn enia na ti o hamọra tan fun ogun, ti nwọn si tọ̀ Dafidi wá si Hebroni, lati pa ijọba Saulu da si ọdọ rẹ̀ gẹgẹ bi ọ̀rọ Oluwa." 
1Chronicles12:24 Awọn ọmọ Juda ti ngbe asa ati ọ̀kọ, jẹ ẹgbãta enia o le ẹgbẹrin, ti o hamọra tan fun ogun." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ninu awọn ọmọ Simeoni, akọni enia fun ogun ẹ̃dẹgbarin o le ọgọrun." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ninu awọn ọmọ Lefi, ẹgbãji o le ẹgbẹta." 
1Chronicles12:27 Jehoiada olori fun Aaroni, ẹgbẹ̃dogun enia o le ẽdẹgbẹrin si wà pẹlu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles12:28 Ati Sadoku, akọni ọdọmọkunrin, ati ninu ile baba rẹ̀ olori mejilelogun." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Benjamini, awọn arakunrin Saulu ẹgbẹ̃dogun: nitori titi di isisiyi, ọ̀pọlọpọ ninu wọn li o ti ntọju iṣọ ile Saulu." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Efraimu ẹgbãwa o le ẹgbẹrin, akọni ọkunrin, enia olorukọ ni nwọn ni ile baba wọn." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ati àbọ ẹ̀ya Manasse ẹgbãsan, ti a yan nipa orukọ, lati lọ fi Dafidi jẹ ọba." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Issakari, ti o ni oye akoko, lati mọ̀ ohun ti Israeli iba ma ṣe; olori wọn jẹ igba; ati gbogbo awọn arakunrin wọn mbẹ ni ikawọ wọn." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ninu ti Sebuluni, iru awọn ti o jade lọ si ogun ti o mọ̀ ogun iwé, pẹlu gbogbo ohun èlo ogun, ẹgbamẹ̃dọgbọn; ti nwọn kì ifi iye-meji tẹgun." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ati ninu ti Naftali ẹgbẹrun olori ogun, ati pẹlu wọn ti awọn ti asa ati ọ̀kọ ẹgbã mejidilogun o le ẹgbẹrun." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ati ninu awọn ọmọ Dani ti o mọ̀ ogun iwé, ẹgbã mẹtala o le ẹgbẹta." 
1Chronicles12:36 Ati ninu ti Aṣeri, iru awọn ti njade lọ si ogun, ti o mọ̀ ogun iwé, ọkẹ meje." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ati li apa keji odò Jordani, ninu ti awọn ọmọ Reubeni, ati awọn ọmọ Gadi, ati abọ ẹya Manasse, pẹlu gbogbo onirũru ohun elo ogun fun ogun ọ̀kọ, ọkẹ mẹfa." 
1Chronicles12:38 Gbogbo awọn ọkunrin ogun wọnyi ti nwọn mọ̀ bi a iti itẹ ogun, nwọn fi ọkàn pipe wá si Hebroni, lati fi Dafidi jọba lori Israeli: gbogbo awọn iyokù ninu Israeli si jẹ oninu kan pẹlu lati fi Dafidi jẹ ọba." 
1Chronicles12:39 Nibẹ, ni nwọn si wà pẹlu Dafidi ni ijọ mẹta, nwọn njẹ, nwọn si nmu, nitoriti awọn ará wọn ti pèse fun wọn." 
1Chronicles12:40 Pẹlupẹlu awọn ti o sunmọ wọn, ani titi de ọdọ Issakari, ati Sebuluni, ati Naftali, mu akara wá lori kẹtẹkẹtẹ, ati lori ibakasiẹ, ati lori ibãka, ati lori malu, ani onjẹ ti iyẹfun, eso ọ̀pọtọ, ati eso àjara gbigbẹ, ati ọti-waini, ati ororo, ati malu, ati agutan li ọ̀pọlọpọ: nitori ti ayọ̀ wà ni Israeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 DAFIDI si ba awọn olori ogun ẹgbẹgbẹrun ati ọrọrun ati olukuluku olori gbèro. 
1Chronicles13:2 Dafidi si wi fun gbogbo ijọ Israeli pe, Bi o ba dara loju nyin, bi o ba si ti ọwọ Oluwa Ọlọrun wa wá, jẹ ki a ranṣẹ kiri sọdọ awọn arakunrin wa ni ibi gbogbo, ti o kù ni gbogbo ilẹ Israeli, ati pẹlu wọn si alufa ati awọn ọmọ Lefi ti mbẹ ni ilu agbegbe wọn, ki nwọn ki o le ko ara wọn jọ sọdọ wa:" 
1Chronicles13:3 Ẹ jẹ ki a si tun mu apoti ẹri Ọlọrun wa wa si ọdọ wa: nitoriti awa kò ṣafẹri rẹ̀ li ọjọ Saulu. 
1Chronicles13:4 Gbogbo ijọ na si wipe, ẹ jẹ ki a ṣe bẹ̃: nitori ti nkan na tọ loju gbogbo enia." 
1Chronicles13:5 Bẹ̃ni Dafidi ko gbogbo Israeli jọ lati odò Egipti ani titi de Hemati, lati mu apoti ẹri Ọlọrun lati Kirjat-jearimu wá." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dafidi si gòke ati gbogbo Israeli si Baala, si Kirjat-jearimu, ti iṣe ti Juda, lati mu apoti ẹ̀ri Ọlọrun Oluwa gòke lati ibẹ wá, ti ngbe arin Kerubimu, nibiti a npe orukọ Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles13:7 Nwọn si gbé apoti ẹri Ọlọrun ka kẹkẹ́ titun lati inu ile Abinadabu wá, ati Ussa ati Ahio ntọ́ kẹkẹ́ na." 
1Chronicles13:8 Ati Dafidi ati gbogbo Israeli fi gbogbo agbara wọn ṣire niwaju Ọlọrun, pẹlu orin, ati pẹlu duru, ati pẹlu psalteri, ati pẹlu timbreli, ati pẹlu simbali, ati pẹlu ipè." 
1Chronicles13:9 Nigbati nwọn si de ilẹ ipaka Kidroni, Ussa nà ọwọ rẹ̀ lati di apoti ẹri na mu; nitoriti awọn malu kọsẹ." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ibinu Oluwa si ru si Ussa, o si lù, nibẹ li o si kú niwaju Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dafidi si binu nitori ti Oluwa ké Ussa kuro: nitorina ni a ṣe pè ibẹ na ni Peres-Ussa titi di oni. 
1Chronicles13:12 Dafidi si bẹ̀ru Ọlọrun li ọjọ na wipe, Emi o ha ṣe mu apoti ẹri Ọlọrun wá sọdọ mi?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Bẹ̃ni Dafidi kò mu apoti ẹri na bọ̀ si ọdọ ara rẹ̀ si ilu Dafidi, ṣugbọn o gbé e ya si ile Obed-Edomu ara Gitti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Apoti ẹri Ọlọrun si ba awọn ara ile Obed-Edomu gbe ni ile rẹ̀ li oṣu mẹta. Oluwa si bukún ile Obed-Edomu ati ohun gbogbo ti o ni. 
1Chronicles14:1 HIRAMU ọba Tire si ran onṣẹ si Dafidi, ati igi Kedari, pẹlu awọn ọmọle ati gbẹnagbẹna, lati kọ́le fun u." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dafidi si woye pe, Oluwa ti fi idi on joko li ọba lori Israeli, nitori a gbé ijọba rẹ̀ ga nitori ti awọn enia rẹ̀, Israeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dafidi si mu awọn aya si i ni Jerusalemu: Dafidi si bi ọmọkunrin ati ọmọbinrin si i. 
1Chronicles14:4 Wọnyi si li orukọ awọn ọmọ rẹ̀ ti o ni ni Jerusalemu; Ṣammua ati Ṣobabu, Natani, ati Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ati Ibhari, ati Eliṣua, ati Elpaleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Ati Noga, ati Nefegi, ati Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Ati Eliṣama, ati Beeliada, ati Elifaleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Nigbati awọn ara Filistia si gbọ́ pe, a fi ororo yan Dafidi li ọba lori gbogbo Israeli, gbogbo awọn ara Filistia gòke lọ iwá Dafidi: Dafidi si gbọ́, o si jade tọ̀ wọn." 
1Chronicles14:9 Awọn ara Filistia si wá, nwọn si tẹ ara wọn ni afonifoji Refaimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Dafidi si bere lọdọ Ọlọrun wipe, Ki emi ki o gòke tọ awọn ara Filistia lọ? Iwọ o ha fi wọn le mi lọwọ? Oluwa si wi fun u pe, Gòke lọ, emi o si fi wọn le ọ lọwọ." 
1Chronicles14:11 Bẹ̃ni nwọn gòke lọ si Baal-perasimu; Dafidi si kọlù wọn nibẹ. Dafidi si wipe, Ọlọrun ti ti ọwọ mi yà lu awọn ọta mi bi yiya omi: nitorina ni nwọn ṣe npè ibẹ na ni Baal-perasimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Nwọn si fi awọn orisa wọn silẹ nibẹ, Dafidi si wipe, ki a fi iná sun wọn." 
1Chronicles14:13 Awọn ara Filistia si tun tẹ ara wọn kakiri ni afonifoji. 
1Chronicles14:14 Nitorina ni Dafidi tun bère lọwọ Ọlọrun: Ọlọrun si wi fun u pe, Máṣe gòke tọ̀ wọn; yipada kuro lọdọ wọn, ki o si ja lu wọn niwaju igi mulberi." 
1Chronicles14:15 Yio si ṣe, nigbati iwọ ba gbọ́ iro ẹsẹ lòke igi mulberi, nigbana ni ki iwọ ki o gbogun jade: nitori Ọlọrun jade ṣaju rẹ lọ lati kọlù ogun awọn ara Filistia." 
1Chronicles14:16 Dafidi si ṣe gẹgẹ bi Ọlọrun ti paṣẹ fun u: nwọn si kọlù ogun awọn ara Filistia lati Gibeoni titi de Gaseri. 
1Chronicles14:17 Okiki Dafidi si kan yi gbogbo ilẹ ka. Oluwa si mu ki ẹ̀ru rẹ̀ ki o ba gbogbo orilẹ-ède. 
1Chronicles15:1 DAFIDI si kọ́ ile fun ara rẹ̀ ni ilu Dafidi, o si pese ipò kan fun apoti ẹri Ọlọrun, o si pa agọ kan fun u." 
1Chronicles15:2 Nigbana ni Dafidi wipe, Ẹnikan kò yẹ lati rù apoti ẹri Ọlọrun bikoṣe awọn ọmọ Lefi; nitori awọn ni Oluwa ti yàn lati ma gbé apoti ẹri Ọlọrun, ati lati ma ṣe iranṣẹ fun u titi lai." 
1Chronicles15:3 Dafidi si ko gbogbo Israeli jọ si Jerusalemu, lati gbé apoti ẹri Oluwa gòke lọ si ipò rẹ̀ ti o ti pese fun u." 
1Chronicles15:4 Dafidi si pè awọn ọmọ Aaroni, ati awọn ọmọ Lefi jọ." 
1Chronicles15:5 Ninu awọn ọmọ Kohati; Urieli olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ ọgọfa:" 
1Chronicles15:6 Ninu awọn ọmọ Merari; Asaiah olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ igba o le ogun:" 
1Chronicles15:7 Ninu awọn ọmọ Gerṣomu; Joeli olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ ãdoje:" 
1Chronicles15:7 Ninu awọn ọmọ Gerṣomu; Joeli olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ ãdoje:" 
1Chronicles15:8 Ninu awọn ọmọ Elisafani; Ṣemaiah olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ igba." 
1Chronicles15:9 Ninu awọn ọmọ Hebroni; Elieli olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ ọgọrin:" 
1Chronicles15:10 Ninu awọn ọmọ Ussieli; Aminadabu olori, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ mejilelãdọfa." 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafidi si ranṣẹ pè Sadoku ati Abiatari awọn alufa; ati awọn ọmọ Lefi, Urieli, Asaiah, ati Joeli, Ṣemaiah, ati Elieli, ati Aminadabu;" 
1Chronicles15:11 Dafidi si ranṣẹ pè Sadoku ati Abiatari awọn alufa; ati awọn ọmọ Lefi, Urieli, Asaiah, ati Joeli, Ṣemaiah, ati Elieli, ati Aminadabu;" 
1Chronicles15:12 O si wi fun wọn pe, Ẹnyin li olori awọn baba awọn ọmọ Lefi: ẹ ya ara nyin si mimọ́, ẹnyin ati awọn arakunrin nyin, ki ẹnyin ki o le gbé apoti ẹri Oluwa Ọlọrun Israeli gòke lọ si ibi ti mo ti pèse fun u." 
1Chronicles15:13 Nitoriti ẹnyin kò rù u li akọṣe, ni Oluwa Ọlọrun wa fi ṣe ẹ̀ya si wa li ara, nitori awa kò wá a bi o ti yẹ." 
1Chronicles15:14 Bẹ̃ li awọn alufa ati awọn ọmọ Lefi ya ara wọn si mimọ́ lati gbe apoti ẹri Oluwa Ọlọrun Israeli gòke wá. 
1Chronicles15:15 Awọn ọmọ Lefi si rù apoti ẹri Ọlọrun bi Mose ti pa a li aṣẹ gẹgẹ bi ọ̀rọ Oluwa, nwọn fi ọpa rù u li ejika wọn." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dafidi si wi fun olori awọn ọmọ Lefi pe ki nwọn yàn awọn arakunrin wọn, awọn akọrin pẹlu ohun èlo orin, psalteri ati duru, ati kimbali; ti ndún kikan ti o si nfi ayọ gbé ohùn soke." 
1Chronicles15:17 Bẹ̃ li awọn ọmọ Lefi yan Hemani ọmọ Joeli; ati ninu awọn arakunrin rẹ̀, Asafu ọmọ Berekiah; ati ninu awọn ọmọ Merari arakunrin wọn, Etani ọmọ Kuṣaiah;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Bẹ̃ li awọn ọmọ Lefi yan Hemani ọmọ Joeli; ati ninu awọn arakunrin rẹ̀, Asafu ọmọ Berekiah; ati ninu awọn ọmọ Merari arakunrin wọn, Etani ọmọ Kuṣaiah;" 
1Chronicles15:18 Ati pẹlu wọn awọn arakunrin wọn li ọwọ́ keji; Sekariah, Beni, ati Jaasieli, ati Ṣemiramotu, ati Jehieli, ati Unni, Eliabu, ati Benaiah, ati Maaseiah, ati Obed-Edomu, ati Jeieli awọn adena." 
1Chronicles15:19 Awọn akọrin si ni Hemani, Asafu, ati Etani, ti awọn ti kimbali ti ndun kikan;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Ati Sekariah, ati Asieli, ati Ṣemiramotu, ati Jelieli, ati Unni, ati Eliabu, ati Maaseiah, ati Benaiah, ti awọn ti psaltiri olohùn òke;" 
1Chronicles15:21 Ati Mattitiah, ati Elifeleti, ati Mikneiah, lati fi duru olokun mẹjọ ṣaju orin." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ati Kenaniah, olori awọn ọmọ Lefi ni ọ̀ga orin: on ni nkọni li orin, nitoriti o moye rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ati Berekiah, ati Elkana li awọn adena fun apoti ẹri na." 
1Chronicles15:24 Ati Ṣebaniah, ati Jehoṣafati, ati Netaneeli, ati Amasai, ati Sekariah, ati Benaiah, ati Elieseri, awọn alufa, li o nfun ipè niwaju apoti ẹri Ọlọrun: ati Obed-Edomu, ati Jehiah li awọn adena fun apoti ẹri na." 
1Chronicles15:25 Bẹ̃ni Dafidi ati awọn agbagba Israeli, ati awọn olori ẹgbẹgbẹrun, lọ lati gbe apoti ẹri majẹmu Oluwa jade ti ile Obed-Edomu gòke wá pẹlu ayọ̀." 
1Chronicles15:26 O si ṣe, nigbati Ọlọrun ràn awọn ọmọ Lefi lọwọ ti o rù apoti ẹri majẹmu Oluwa, ni nwọn fi malu meje ati àgbo meje rubọ." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dafidi si wọ̀ aṣọ igunwa ọ̀gbọ daradara, ati gbogbo awọn ọmọ Lefi ti nrù apoti ẹri na, ati awọn akọrin, ati Kenaniah olori orin pẹlu awọn akọrin: efodu ọ̀gbọ si wà lara Dafidi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Bayi ni gbogbo Israeli gbé apoti ẹri majẹmu Oluwa gòke wá pẹlu iho ayọ̀, ati iró fère, ati pẹlu ipè, ati kimbali, psalteri ati duru si ndún kikankikan." 
1Chronicles15:29 O si ṣe bi apoti ẹri majẹmu Oluwa na ti de ilu Dafidi ni Mikali ọmọ Saulu obinrin yọju wode ni fèrese, o ri Dafidi ọba njó, o si nṣire; o si kẹgan rẹ̀ li ọkàn rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles16:1 BẸ̀NI nwọn mu apoti ẹri Ọlọrun wá, nwọn si fi si arin agọ na ti Dafidi pa fun u: nwọn si ru ẹbọ sisun ati ẹbọ alafia niwaju Ọlọrun," 
1Chronicles16:2 Nigbati Dafidi si ti pari riru ẹbọ sisun ati ẹbọ alafia tan, o sure fun awọn enia li orukọ Oluwa." 
1Chronicles16:3 O si fi fun gbogbo enia Israeli, ati ọkunrin ati obinrin fun olukulùku iṣu akara kan, ati ekiri ẹran kan, ati akara didùn kan." 
1Chronicles16:4 O si yan ninu awọn ọmọ Lefi lati ma jọsin niwaju apoti ẹri Oluwa, ati lati ṣe iranti, ati lati dupẹ, ati lati yìn Oluwa Ọlọrun Israeli:" 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ni olori, ati atẹle rẹ̀ ni Sekariah, Jeieli, ati Ṣemiramotu, ati Jehieli, ati Mattitiah, ati Eliabu, ati Benaiah, ati Obed-Edomu: ati Jeieli pẹlu psalteri ati pẹlu duru; ṣugbọn Asafu li o nlù kimbali kikan;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaiah pẹlu ati Jahasieli awọn alufa pẹlu ipè nigbagbogbo niwaju apoti ẹri ti majẹmu Ọlọrun. 
1Chronicles16:7 Li ọjọ na ni Dafidi kọ́ fi orin mimọ́ yi le Asafu lọwọ lati dupẹ lọwọ Oluwa. 
1Chronicles16:8 Ẹ fi ọpẹ fun Oluwa, ẹ pè orukọ rẹ̀, ẹ fi iṣẹ rẹ̀ hàn ninu awọn enia." 
1Chronicles16:9 Ẹ kọrin si i, ẹ kọ́ orin mimọ́ si i, ẹ ma sọ̀rọ gbogbo iṣẹ iyanu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles16:10 Ẹ ma ṣogo li orukọ rẹ̀ mimọ́; jẹ ki ọkàn awọn ti nwá Oluwa ki o yọ̀. 
1Chronicles16:11 Ẹ ma wá Oluwa, ati ipa rẹ̀, ma wá oju rẹ̀ nigbagbogbo." 
1Chronicles16:12 Ẹ ma ranti iṣẹ iyanu rẹ̀ ti o ti ṣe, iṣẹ àmi rẹ̀, ati idajọ ẹnu rẹ̀;" 
1Chronicles16:13 Ẹnyin iru-ọmọ Israeli iranṣẹ rẹ̀, ẹnyin ọmọ Jakobu ayanfẹ rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles16:14 On ni Oluwa Ọlọrun wa, idajọ rẹ̀ mbẹ ni gbogbo aiye." 
1Chronicles16:15 Ẹ ma ṣe iranti majẹmu rẹ̀ titi lai, ọ̀rọ ti o ti pa li aṣẹ fun ẹgbẹrun iran;" 
1Chronicles16:16 Majẹmu ti o ba Abrahamu da, ati ibura rẹ̀ fun Isaaki;" 
1Chronicles16:17 A si tẹnumọ eyi li ofin fun Jakobu, ati fun Israeli ni majẹmu aiyeraiye:" 
1Chronicles16:18 Wipe, Iwọ li emi o fi ilẹ Kenaani fun, ipin ilẹ-ini nyin." 
1Chronicles16:19 Nigbati ẹnyin wà ni kiun ni iye, ani diẹ kiun, ati atipo ninu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles16:20 Nwọn si nlọ lati orilẹ-ède de orilẹ-ède, ati lati ijọba kan de ọdọ enia miran;" 
1Chronicles16:21 On kò jẹ ki ẹnikẹni ki o ṣe wọn ni ìwọsi, nitõtọ, o ba awọn ọba wi nitori wọn," 
1Chronicles16:22 Wipe, Ẹ má ṣe fi ọwọ kan ẹni-ororo mi, ẹ má si ṣe awọn woli mi ni ibi." 
1Chronicles16:23 Ẹ kọrin titun si Oluwa gbogbo aiye; ẹ ma fi igbala rẹ̀ hàn lati ọjọ de ọjọ. 
1Chronicles16:24 Ẹ sọ̀rọ ogo rẹ̀ ninu awọn keferi; ati iṣẹ-iyanu rẹ̀ ninu gbogbo enia. 
1Chronicles16:25 Nitori titobi li Oluwa, o si ni iyìn gidigidi: on li o si ni ibẹ̀ru jù gbogbo oriṣa lọ." 
1Chronicles16:26 Nitori pe gbogbo oriṣa awọn enia, ere ni nwọ́n: ṣugbọn Oluwa li o da awọn ọrun." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ogo on ọlá wà niwaju rẹ̀; agbara ati ayọ̀ mbẹ ni ipò rẹ̀. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ẹ fi fun Oluwa, ẹnyin ibatan enia, ẹ fi ogo ati ipa fun Oluwa." 
1Chronicles16:29 Ẹ fi ogo fun Oluwa ti o yẹ fun orukọ rẹ̀: mu ọrẹ wá, ki ẹ si wá siwaju rẹ̀: ẹ sin Oluwa ninu ẹwà ìwa-mimọ́." 
1Chronicles16:30 Ẹ warìri niwaju rẹ̀, gbogbo aiye aiye pẹlu si fi idi mulẹ ti kì o fi le yi." 
1Chronicles16:31 Jẹ ki awọn ọrun ki o yọ̀, si jẹ ki inu aiye ki o dùn; si jẹ ki a wi ninu awọn orilẹ-ède pe, Oluwa jọba." 
1Chronicles16:32 Jẹ ki okun ki o ma ho, ati ẹkún rẹ̀: jẹ ki papa-oko tùtu ki o yọ̀, ati ohun gbogbo ti mbẹ ninu rẹ̀." 
1Chronicles16:33 Nigbana ni awọn igi igbo yio ma ho niwaju Oluwa, nitori ti o mbọ wá ṣe idajọ aiye." 
1Chronicles16:34 Ẹ fi ọpẹ fun Oluwa, nitori ti o ṣeun: nitoriti ãnu rẹ̀ duro lailai." 
1Chronicles16:35 Ki ẹ si wipe, Gbà wa Ọlọrun igbala wa, si gbá wa jọ, ki o si gbà wa lọwọ awọn keferi, ki awa ki o le ma fi ọpẹ fun orukọ rẹ mimọ́, ki a si le ma ṣogo ninu iyin rẹ." 
1Chronicles16:36 Olubukún li Oluwa Ọlọrun Israeli lai ati lailai. Gbogbo awọn enia si wipe, Amin, nwọn si yìn Oluwa." 
1Chronicles16:37 Bẹ̃ li o fi Asafu ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀ silẹ nibẹ niwaju apoti ẹri majẹmu Oluwa lati ma jọsìn niwaju apoti ẹri na nigbagbogbo, bi iṣẹ ojojumọ ti nfẹ." 
1Chronicles16:38 Ati Obed-Edomu pẹlu awọn arakunrin wọn, enia mejidilãdọrin; ati Obed-Edomu ọmọ Jedutuni, ati Hosa lati ma ṣe adena:" 
1Chronicles16:39 Sadoku alufa, ati awọn arakunrin rẹ̀, awọn alufa, niwaju agọ Oluwa, ni ibi giga ti o wà ni Gibeoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 Lati ma ru ẹbọ sisun si Oluwa lori pẹpẹ ẹbọ sisun nigbagbogbo li owurọ ati li alẹ, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyi ti a kọ ninu ofin Oluwa, ti o pa li aṣẹ fun Israeli;" 
1Chronicles16:41 Ati pẹlu wọn Hemani ati Jedutuni, ati awọn iyokù ti a yàn, ti a si pe li orukọ, lati ma fi ìyin fun Oluwa, nitori ti ãnu rẹ̀ duro lailai;" 
1Chronicles16:42 Ati pẹlu wọn Hemani ati Jedutuni pẹlu ipè ati kimbali fun awọn ti yio ma pariwo, ati pẹlu ohun èlo orin Ọlọrun. Awọn ọmọ Jedutuni li awọn adena." 
1Chronicles16:43 Gbogbo awọn enia si lọ olukuluku si ile rẹ̀: Dafidi yipada lati sure fun ile rẹ̀. 
1Chronicles17:1 O SI ṣe, bi Dafidi ti joko ninu ile rẹ̀, ni Dafidi sọ fun Natani woli pe, Wò o, emi ngbe inu ile kedari, ṣugbọn apoti ẹri majẹmu Oluwa ngbe abẹ aṣọ-tita." 
1Chronicles17:2 Nigbana ni Natani wi fun Dafidi pe, Ṣe ohun gbogbo ti mbẹ ni inu rẹ; nitoriti Ọlọrun wà pẹlu rẹ." 
1Chronicles17:3 O si ṣe li oru kanna ni ọ̀rọ Ọlọrun tọ Natani wá, wipe," 
1Chronicles17:4 Lọ, si sọ fun Dafidi iranṣẹ mi pe, Bayi li Oluwa wi, Iwọ kò gbọdọ kọ́ ile fun mi lati ma gbe." 
1Chronicles17:5 Nitori emi kò ti igbe inu ile lati ọjọ ti mo ti mu Israeli gòke wá titi fi di oni yi; ṣugbọn emi nlọ lati agọ de agọ, ati lati ibugbe kan de keji." 
1Chronicles17:6 Nibikibi ti mo ti nrin larin gbogbo Israeli, emi ha sọ̀rọ kan fun ọkan ninu awọn onidajọ Israeli, ti emi ti paṣẹ fun lati ma bọ awọn enia mi, emi ha ti wipe, Ẽṣe ti ẹnyin kò fi kọ́ ile igi kedari fun mi bi?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Njẹ nitorina bayi ni iwọ o wi fun Dafidi iranṣẹ mi, Bayi li Oluwa awọn ọmọ-ogun wi, Emi mu ọ kuro ni pápá oko-tutu, ani kuro lati ma tọ agutan lẹhin, ki iwọ ki o le ma ṣe olori awọn enia mi Israeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Emi si ti wà pẹlu rẹ ni ibikibi ti iwọ ba lọ, emi si ti ké gbogbo awọn ọta rẹ kuro niwaju rẹ, emi o si ṣe ọ li olorukọ kan, bi orukọ awọn enia nla ti o ti wà li aiye." 
1Chronicles17:9 Emi o si yan ibi kan fun Israeli awọn enia mi, emi o si gbìn wọn, ki nwọn le má gbe ipò wọn, a kì yio si ṣì wọn mọ; bẹ̃ni ọmọ buburu kì yio yọ wọn lẹnu mọ, bi ti atijọ;" 
1Chronicles17:10 Ati bi igba ti emi ti fi enia jẹ onidajọ lori awọn enia mi Israeli. Ati pẹlu emi o ṣẹgun gbogbo awọn ọta rẹ. Pẹlupẹlu mo ti sọ fun ọ pe, Oluwa yio kọle kan fun ọ." 
1Chronicles17:11 Yio si ṣe, nigbati ọjọ rẹ ba pe, ti iwọ o lọ pẹlu awọn baba rẹ, ni emi o gbé iru-ọmọ rẹ dide lẹhin rẹ, ti yio jẹ ọkan ninu awọn ọmọ rẹ ọkunrin; emi o si fi idi ijọba rẹ̀ mulẹ." 
1Chronicles17:12 On o kọ́ ile fun mi, emi o si fi idi itẹ rẹ̀ mulẹ lailai." 
1Chronicles17:13 Emi o jẹ baba fun u, on o si jẹ ọmọ fun mi; emi kì yio si gbà ãnu mi kuro lọdọ rẹ̀, bi mo ti gbà a lọwọ ẹniti o ti wà ṣaju rẹ:" 
1Chronicles17:14 Ṣugbọn emi o fi idi rẹ̀ kalẹ ninu ile mi ati ninu ijọba mi lailai, a o si fi idi itẹ rẹ̀ mulẹ lailai." 
1Chronicles17:15 Gẹgẹ bi gbogbo ọ̀rọ wọnyi, ati gẹgẹ bi gbogbo iran yi, bẹ̃ni Natani sọ fun Dafidi." 
1Chronicles17:16 Dafidi ọba si wá, o si joko niwaju Oluwa, o si wipe, Tali emi Oluwa Ọlọrun, ati kini ile mi, ti iwọ si mu mi de ihinyi?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ohun kekere si li eyi li oju rẹ, Ọlọrun: iwọ si ti sọ pẹlu sipa ile iranṣẹ rẹ fun akokò jijin ti mbọ, o si ka mi si bi iṣe enia giga, Oluwa Ọlọrun." 
1Chronicles17:18 Kini Dafidi le tun ma sọ pẹlu fun ọ niti ọlá ti a bù fun iranṣẹ rẹ? iwọ sa mọ̀ iranṣẹ rẹ. 
1Chronicles17:19 Oluwa, nitoriti iranṣẹ rẹ, ati gẹgẹ bi ti inu rẹ, ni iwọ ti ṣe gbogbo ohun nlanla yi, ni sisọ gbogbo nkan nla wọnyi di mimọ̀." 
1Chronicles17:20 Oluwa, kò si ẹniti o dabi rẹ bẹ̃ni kò si Ọlọrun miran lẹhin rẹ, gẹgẹ bi gbogbo eyi ti awa ti fi eti wa gbọ́." 
1Chronicles17:21 Orilẹ-ède kan wo li o wà li aiye ti o dabi enia rẹ, Israeli, ti Ọlọrun lọ irapada lati ṣe enia on tikararẹ, lati ṣe orukọ fun ara rẹ nipa ohun ti o tobi ti o si lẹ̀ru, ni lile awọn orilẹ-ède jade kuro niwaju awọn enia rẹ, ti iwọ ti rapada lati Egipti jade wá?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Nitori awọn enia rẹ Israeli li o ti ṣe li enia rẹ titi lai; iwọ Oluwa, si di Ọlọrun wọn." 
1Chronicles17:23 Njẹ nisisiyi, Oluwa! jẹ ki ọ̀rọ ti iwọ ti sọ niti iranṣẹ rẹ, ati niti ile rẹ̀ ki o fi idi mulẹ lailai, ki iwọ ki o si ṣe bi iwọ ti wi." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ani, jẹ ki o fi idi mulẹ, ki a le ma gbé orukọ rẹ ga lailai, wipe, Oluwa awọn ọmọ ogun li Ọlọrun Israeli, ani Ọlọrun fun Israeli; si jẹ ki ile Dafidi iranṣẹ rẹ ki o fi idi mulẹ niwaju rẹ." 
1Chronicles17:25 Nitori iwọ, Ọlọrun mi, ti ṣi iranṣẹ rẹ li eti pe, Iwọ o kọ́ ile kan fun u: nitorina ni iranṣẹ rẹ ri i lati gbadua niwaju rẹ." 
1Chronicles17:26 Njẹ nisisiyi Oluwa, Iwọ li Ọlọrun, iwọ si ti sọ ọ̀rọ ore yi fun iranṣẹ rẹ;" 
1Chronicles17:27 Njẹ nisisiyi jẹ ki o wù ọ lati bukún ile iranṣẹ rẹ, ki o le ma wà niwaju rẹ lailai: nitori iwọ Oluwa, ẹniti o sure fun, ire ni o si ma jẹ lailai."
